name: Walk to stores/parks/downtown. Fenced yard/Pets OK
description:
Walk to town in ten minutes! Monthly rental includes utilities, wifi, linens and everything you'll need to make a home in downtown Asheville. Quiet and friendly neighborhood, one mile from the hospital or UNCA. Fenced private backyard and private deck. Private laundry room and lock up spot for your bike. Dedicated parking spot. Please contact me in advance if you want to bring your pet(s). I will not allow pets without prior disclosure. There is a security deposit required for all pets.

The space
True Asheville...artist styled apartment with a pet friendly fenced back yard and great neighbors all around. Stay here and easily walk downtown or through the wooded trails and botanical gardens at UNCA. Super convenient neighborhood to walk, bike, run or just stroll around and meet people....very local and friendly! Whole Foods, Trader Joe’s and lots of nearby coffee shops, restaurants and Asheville Yoga Center all within a four block radius.

description:

Cottage has full size bed, private kitchen and bathroom. Please note also, the shower is not huge. It will fit one person just fine.

Two private bathrooms are shared throughout the hostel.

We are a traveler's hostel and therefore CANNOT BOOK TO LOCALS.

The closet has shelves and hangers for storage, and there is a luggage rack to use. 1st floor access with no steps. Linens and towels provided. High speed Wi-Fi is ATT fiber 300mbs.

You will stay in a charming brick rancher in desirable West Asheville. The guest room is on the main floor and the private full bathroom is directly accross the hallway. Features include hardwood floors throughout the main level, granite countertops in the kitchen and baths, a large back deck overlooking the fully fenced-in backyard.

name: Terrace Cottage
description:
Located in one of Asheville's oldest historic districts, walkable to UNC-Asheville, the Omni Grove Park Inn, restaurants, wine shops, markets, greenways, parks and more! Downtown is walkable on well-lit sidewalks (under 2 miles), a 5-min drive away.

The space
Experience a classic, private, Arts & Crafts-style guesthouse in our beautiful historic district close to the center of Asheville. All linens and other amenities including HDTV are provided so just bring your groceries.

The newly-installed UBIQUITI access point is your reliable connection for online meetings and networking.

The cottage is very private and comfortable, situated in a quiet location in our safe and friendly neighborhood. Nice walk to downtown along tree-lined streets with great markets and restaurants along the way. Walk to the university, botanical gardens, parks and greenways.

Enjoy a real cook's kitchen, tiled bathroom, sunny deck, closet storage, and lockin

name: Asheville Dreamer's Cabin
description:
Hi there,
I am usually here half of each month cause I travel for my business. Please ask if need those dates. The cabin is very cozy but also provides privacy and separate baths.
Safe and close to downtown Asheville!
Annie

The space
This beautiful historic log cabin combines the serenity of the Great Smokey Mountains with the flair and soul of it's native New Orleanian owner. Ideally located to provide both privacy and convenience to all Asheville has to offer. Approximately five minutes to enchanting downtown Asheville, the Blue Ridge Pkwy., great hiking, waterfalls, the Folk Art Center, golfing, the Nature Center, the Biltmore estate and more.

Located in a quiet, safe area of East Asheville, all appliances and fully equipped kitchen, 1 TV, off street parking, cable and wifi , linens and towels. Just show up and relax !!

Guest access

Yard is not available

name: Private, peaceful, and free goat therapy
description:
We are a small community of like-minded progressives living in a quiet rural area right outside the city of Asheville. We have a lot of animals (miniature goats, ducks, 2 cats) and while you do not have to interact with them, if you love animals, you will enjoy it here! We enjoy our privacy and quiet and hope for like-minded guests to enjoy it with us! Come for the great hiking, the award winning restaurants and enjoy a little goat therapy too :)

The space
Contemporary studio apartment, suitable for one person or a couple (queen bed) Living Area with smart TV and wireless internet provided, bedroom area with very comfortable queen size bed (all linens provided), fully stocked kitchen large dorm size refrigerator and separate small freezer, bathroom with shower. 7 miles or 10 minutes from downtown Asheville in east Asheville. 5 minutes from the Blue Ridge Parkway and awesome hiking spots. View it all with wine or coffee from the extensive decking above or the pavilion below. Take a book to one of the hammocks. This is a peaceful retreat just five miles to downtown Asheville and a short drive to the Blue Ridge Parkway for hiking and mountain vistas if you can tear yourself away from the fire pit, badminton, boccie ball, corn hole...

It is in such a serene country setting you may not want to leave the FOUR ACRE property with creek, meadow, woods and fire pit, pavilion, horse shoes, badminton, boccie ball, bean bag toss, sky chair and hammocks. name: Athena's Loft:  Find yourself here!
description:
Sweet old-fashioned upstairs homestay space has private entrance, small (tiny) bathroom with a deep claw-foot tub. Microwave (no stove), sink, fridge, washer and dryer -- all on site/private. Eco-memory foam double-size bed & pull-out double futon sofa bed + a single futon bed. Wireless internet, NO TV. Off-street parking. Walk to great food, music, coffee+! Must love grandma's house, as this property is not updated with the latest appliances (see bathroom). Window AC and electric heat.

The space
Athena's Loft is the upstairs of our home, situated in our one-hundred-year-old bungalow, with hosts living downstairs. Hosts are on site for your Homestay home-away-from-home visit to Asheville. You have your own private entryway. The space includes private laundry and bathroom. Sink, microwave and fridge, coffee maker, electric tea kettle. No stove. Small bedroom area with full-size eco-memory foam bed and additional sleeping in the second room on the full-siz

name: Luxurious Mountain Guest Suite Apartment
description:
Escape to our beautifully furnished luxurious apartment Guest Suite ideally located in a private gated community in Keswick Hills, in south Asheville, NC for the most discriminating travelers.

The space
Private Guest Suite Features: King Size four poster bed, Gas Fireplace, Fully Equipped Gourmet Kitchen (Coffee, Tea, Stove, Oven, Microwave, Blender, Spices, Toaster Oven, Full Size Fridge, Dishwasher, etc.) Breakfast Nook for 2, Private Bathroom with Tiled Tub with plenty of towels, shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, etc. We do have Laundry available in the main house if needed, (but it is not in the apartment).


LOCATION!!! Staying at Keswick Hills, a private gated community in south Asheville, is for anyone interested in exploring Asheville while being only
9 miles from Downtown Asheville and close to nearby amenities in a quiet setting.


We also provide a list of recommendations and have available local tourist literature

name: Historic Arts and Craft Home
description:
This beautiful 1925's Art and Crafts home is located in the up and coming River Art District and 2 miles to Pack Square and Biltmore Estates. There are two rooms rented independently. Each bedroom has a King size bed.We have 1.5 bathrooms. Beautiful front porch . There is an outdoor/indoor cat at the house named Lupita. She is friendly and mostly enjoys being outside. I do ask guests are vaccinated against Covid since we’re sharing space.

The space
The mountain areas of Asheville NC are known for the many beautiful arts and crafts style homes that are so popular in this area. Our home is cozy and reflects the added care and detail that home builders of the past took great pains to incorporate in their one of kind homes. Our home was built in 1925 and has just gone thru a complete renovation. New electric, plumbing, kitchen, bathrooms, and all new appliances. While the renovations were extensive the goal was to keep the old fashion charm of this beautiful home.

name: 8 min Walk to DT AVL! Hip, Chic % Sparkling CLEAN
description:
***Disclaimer: we have a busy toddler so You will hear footsteps above you in the common areas, but the bedroom should be quiet, as directly above is our guestroom. Our nightly rate has been adjusted accordingly and has been discounted $45 per night.


Historic neighborhood--walking distance to downtown, and Trader Joe’s! Come enjoy our beautiful apartment and see what great things Asheville has to offer.

The space
Our place is bright, cheery and filled with charm! It’s the perfect launch pad for your Asheville adventures. Restaurants, bars, theaters, galleries, outdoor concerts and so much more are all within walking distance. You can't beat this spot! We are located on a quiet street in historic neighborhood, just 8 minutes walking distance to downtown. There’s also a greenway at the end of our street where you can enjoy 30-50 min of greenway walking!

We are also only a few blocks from Whole Foods, Trader Joe's and Harris Teeter.

name: Romantic, Moroccan-Influenced Cottage
description:
The artist/owner built cottage is a quiet sanctuary located 8 minutes from downtown, the Biltmore Estate, West Asheville shops, an incredible bakery and restaurants. Enjoy handmade pottery, local art, all cotton bedding and fresh eggs within this adorable Moroccan-influenced getaway.
The River Arts District, French Broad River and shops are within walking distance. The Admiral and Bull and Beggar are fantastic. Owl Bakery, Hole donuts, Whist, Flora and Ghan Shen are superb. The Walk and Taco Billy - casual dining. Enjoy!
This is a legal permitted homestay through the city of Asheville. #16-05429

A brand new, Energy Star, one bedroom separate apartment in a restored historical home. Loving care went into creating this warm and homey space. Lots of afternoon sun in bedroom. Check out the pictures and reviews.

description:

The space
This ~500 sq' studio apartment is located in the 5-Points neighborhood on the North edge of Downtown Asheville. It is mostly reclaimed, locally sourced materials and has lots of unique style and character.
If you are just looking for something cheaper than a standardized, corporate, hotel, this is not for you...this is a space that is full of character & life & appreciates its guest to be similar!

The space
Walking distance to downtown.Private entrance, roof top deck, kitchenette,earthen clay plaster walls, spa style tiled bathroom and decks. Lovely space for two. Has a smart tv, AC and fan, free wireless connection. Ideal-situation to relax,explore & enjoy!

name: Lovely mountain home with a view!
description:
Linens and towels provided. You will have access to entire house. Nice, safe residential neighborhood. Secluded yet close to downtown. Located halfway between downtown and the parkway in beautiful Haw Creek valley. 3 beautiful acres with stream.

The space
Nice room with private bath. Has FULL size bed with a comfortable Serta mattress. Linens and towels provided. You will have access to entire house. Secluded yet close to downtown. WiFi but no TV. Very quiet and relaxing. Fragrance free and smoke free. Comfortable, clean and affordable.
Also even though I have no pets, I dog sit occasionally. So if you prefer no pets, please check with me first.

name: #2 Blue Ridge Room at Oakland Cottage B&B
description:
Oakland Cottage is an Asheville historic home, circa 1910, perfect for your Vacation-In-Asheville. The 5,000 sq-ft "cottage" has been naturally separated into 7 guest rooms, each with private bath. The open common areas, available to all guests, create a warm and spacious feel.

The space
Blue Ridge Room #2 is on the first floor with a king bed, full private bath, coffee maker, cable TV, WIFI, extra sitting room and private deck, with stair access to the back yard off the deck.

Pets are welcome in the Blue Ridge room for an additional $15 nightly per pet. There is a simple pet agreement which must be accepted by the pet owner in order to bring a pet to stay with you in your room or suite at Oakland Cottage.

Pricing is based on two guests. There is room for an additional guest for $20 each extra guest per night.

Guest access
Access to the house is available anytime with a lock box code to the front door and private key

The house fully furnished with four bedrooms and two baths, with a great kitchen that has granite count

The panoramic mirror is angled to see the mountain views while your head rests on the pillows. This bedroom has an en-suite bathroom with soaking tub and Kohler shower tiles. description:
1 queen bed with private bath in small shared 1920s Bungalow . Woodstove, organic garden, Large yard filled with large scale sculpture. Quiet neighborhood. 5 minutes to the beautiful scenic blue ridge parkway, 5 min drive to downtown Asheville.

The kitchen is open for you to use. We usually cook our meals at home and you are welcome to join us if you are interested.

The patio and yard are great features on the house. The patio has soft lighting for the evenings and a BBQ to use. We have a large yard where you can find an organic garden, sculptures, a hammock and sometimes even a pingpong table.

name: West A'ville sanctuary in the trees
description:
Beautiful, cozy and quiet.

The space
A peaceful retreat awaits you in the trees just outside of West Asheville's "locals" downtown! Walkable to Haywood Rd and all our excellent neighborhood restaurants, art and yoga studios, farmers market and pubs. Note: Our house is in a dense suburban residential neighborhood and not outside of town. We have neighbors on all sides but we are lucky that our house is in an urban forest that affords privacy.

Our space is suitable for travelers seeking unique accommodation not luxury hotel room. Our ideal guest is out and about all day and when back from a day of adventure enjoys a cozy, simple, clean space and porch to sit on and commute with the urban forrest surrounding us. It is not suitable for people who have trouble with mobility and are looking to spend a lot of time in the space. We don’t have TV and the room is small.

The studio apartment is below the main house which has its own entrance and outdo

description:
Two bedrooms available in my home in the Emma neighborhood of West Asheville. The location is perfect for getting into West Asheville, the River Arts District, less than five miles to downtown and there is always hiking or tubing (depending on the time of year) on the French Broad River. After a day in town, sit back and relax on the front porch listening to the mockingbirds.

(FYI - I am staying elsewhere on the property at this time).

The space
I have a cozy house with two bedrooms to offer to travelers who come to visit Asheville. Check out the funk of the Asheville scene; music, art, restaurants, breweries and of course the glorious mountains. My little home is located 4.5 short miles from downtown and about 2 miles from the River Arts District.

The master bedroom provides a queen sized bed, while the guest room offers a full . Each room has a closet and dresser, there is a single bathroom. You will also have access to the washer an

description:

Very Private

This guest suite (ZenShe) is in the main house but does NOT visually share any part of the of owners quarters. Home owners enter through their front door and through a vestibule into their home. name: Asheville Montford Cottage, Walk To Town, 30 Days
description:

The space
A taste of Real Asheville! This Arts and Crafts cottage is located in possibly the most popular area of Asheville, Montford. One of the most beautiful and largest historic districts in the state of North Carolina, filled with beautiful landscaping and structures, many of which were built between 1890 and 1925, reflecting Victorian, Tudor, Colonial Revival, Arts and Craft and Georgian architectural styles.
My home is 2000sq ft and provides lots of privacy. Decorated with many beautiful antiques and works of local artist, has hardwood floors and rugs and is filled with lots of beautiful natural light. The large den is very comfortable; with a comfy leather sofa, recliners

name: The Cottage on Parkway Loop
description:
The Cottage is a cozy, light, fully self contained (small) home. It has all the amenities of a larger home, but with the comfortable convenience of a smaller space. It's just the right distance from Downtown, with the peace and privacy of a small neighborhood.

The space
The Cottage on Parkway Loop is a peaceful, welcoming space that provides you the opportunity to truly relax.

If you've ever wondered what it's like to live in a tiny home, come stay with us and find out!

At 600 sq ft The Cottage has a lot to offer for its diminutive size. Downstairs are the living room, kitchen, and dining areas. A full bath with claw-foot tub with shower and laundry adjoins the living room. Upstairs is the master bedroom with king- sized bed and half bath. This light filled room is tucked into a dormer with large windows looking out into a canopy of trees. A small nook entices you to stay and read a while.

The fully equipped custom kitchen

name: Blend City and Country at Lucky W Cottage
description: Wake up to a breakfast of super-fresh eggs after a great night in a 19th century antique bed with a 3" memory foam topper. This detached cottage is on a farm, and there's old-world stone work, a rock path, and even a Hobbit Hole awaiting discovery as well as many other outdoor areas. It is about 100' from the main house but is very private with mountain views. Take a swim in the pool or visit the horses and chickens. Only 10 minutes from downtown and 5 minutes from groceries and restaurants.

name: Modern Meets Zen, Rest & Restore - West Asheville
description:
Want to experience something different in Asheville? Looking to relax & rejuvenate but also easy access to everything? My home is a hybrid of modern & traditional, Asian & Western, modern & cozy. Walking distance to many local favorites in W. Asheville, the feel & tone of my home is quiet, contemplative, & refreshing. Birds & butterflies abound the garden & yard. A meditative, quiet space. Not suitable if you are in Asheville to party or to drink!

description: Bask in the natural sunlight through the clerestory windows, then step out to the backyard for views of Pisgah Mountain and wonderful western sunsets. Have a glass of wine or cup of tea in your private solarium. Explore the nearby River Arts district and Biltmore House, find calm by the maple tree among the birds, rabbits, squirrels, viewed from the solarium.

description:
Town and country – best of both worlds. Romantic! Semi-secluded, 5 minutes from town, near Blue Ridge Parkway. Close mountain views from the wrap-around deck. Hot tub for 6. Fire pit in quarter-acre yard, chiminea on deck, gas log fireplace inside. Yard completely fenced & gated with playground. Cable TV, high-speed wireless internet. 1- and 2-night stays are available only if they are hemmed in by other bookings. Please email request for information about shorter stays. Dogs may be acceptable.

The space
Red Gate Cottage is a 1,100 s.f. log and stone cabin with 3 bedrooms – queen bed in master and double bed in second bedroom. Third bedroom flexible – either two extra-long twin beds or one king bed. 2 bathrooms – en suite master bath has deep soaking tub with candle sconces. Vintage cabin faced with stone and cedar on the outside and exposed original log walls on inside. Cathedral ceilings throughout are faced with pine planks. Three fireplaces: big river stone

description:
Welcome to my beautiful homestay! PREMIERE LOCALE: 2.5 blocks to the popular South Slope. 5 blocks to Downtown. 10 mins to the Blue Ridge Parkway nature trails. HOME: Clay painted walls. Gorgeous organic gardens. Peaceful environ. YOUR ROOM is 1 of 4. Sleeps 2 on a double bed. With closet, dresser, lamp, fan. Bathroom & kitchen are shared. NO AC or TV. Everything under 'Neighborhood' is an easy walk. Nearby baseball games can be noisy--bring earplugs. Read ALL details below before booking : )

The space
***PLEASE NOTE: We live in one of the most biodiverse temperate rainforests on the planet, ie: this area is teeming with life....including insect life. While our home is cleaned & vacuumed weekly, if you prefer 100% air-tight hotel environments, please do *not* book with us. We enjoy our old-home charm, open air living, the sounds of nature....and don't mind the occasional moth or daddy long leg. If this sounds good, please come enjoy. We'd love to have you! Otherw

name: #3 Downtown  Get Around
description:
This historic downtown apt is perfect for your Asheville adventure. It is only a 5 to 10 minute walk to downtown & convenient to 3 major grocery stores.

The space
400 square feet upstairs apartment. Access to downstairs porch. Bathroom is small. AC is window units, not central air.

Guest access
Smart TV- has a roku player with Netflix, Spectrum TV, and 6 HBO channels
Wifi available

Other things to note
Stuff to do:
In general "Best of WNC" (bestofwnc.com) is a great way to get ideas. The winners are generally legitimate, and there are a ton of specific categories.

•Take a stroll, keep an open mind, and let adventure happen. You will almost certainly run into someone you didn't expect to see.
•Start conversations with strangers. Asheville is rivaled only by the gulf coast for friendly strangers.
•Tune your radio to 88.7 WNCW, 88.1 WCQS (classical) or 98.1 TheRiver
•Play some pinball

name: Walk to cafes, pubs, music
description:

There is a nice back way/marked bike bath from Haywood to festive River Arts District and downtown Asheville. Nearby trails & easy access to the Parkway. My past tenants are repeat renters and will gladly provide references about the details, comfort, and convenience of my home. I look forward to hostin

description:
Private 4 bedroom, 3 bath home with beautiful long range mountain views. 20 minutes to downtown Asheville and 20 minutes from Black Mountain. Spacious yard with fire pit and sun deck.

The space
This mountain retreat is nestled in beautiful Riceville valley. The house is clean and comfortable, and offers a relaxing atmosphere with the amenities of home. There are 3 bedrooms in the top floor. The master bedroom has a private bathroom and deck, while the two additional bedrooms share a bath. The master bedroom has a queen bed, the second bedroom has a queen bed, and third bedroom has a single bed. The kitchen is outfitted with cooking equipment and staples, the dining room provides lovely ambiance, and the living room has large windows and lots of light.
The downstairs section of the house has a bedroom with queen sized bed and twin bed, dresser, TV, and a small vanity closet with sink. Note that this bedroom has no windows. There is also a small bathroom and

Spacious and private 800 sf of space in the heart of Asheville. View the action on College St. from the living room windows. You are steps away from restaurants, brew pubs, & shopping. One bedroom, with living room (& Smart TV), dining area and full kitchen. All the comforts necessary for a long-term stay.

The space

Guest access

description:
Come try something new and adventurous and stay at our yurt and enjoy the best of both worlds. You can feel a closeness to nature while not skimping on amenities as our yurt is outfitted with everything you need to have wonderful retreat.

The space

description:

30 Day Minimum.

1 bedroom / 1 bathroom.

I say this as some folks prefer a more sterile and controlled environment and do

We also provide easy access to a large deck offering spectacular views from almost 3000 feet - similar those as seen from the Grove Park Inn - only higher up!

The living room has high ceilings and similar views as the Grove Park Inn. On a clear

You will have access to the entire house.

Additional $25 cleaning fee for dogs.


4474

**Our COVID cleaning routine: All surfaces and high-touch points are cleaned and disinfected with CDC approved products. All towels and bedding are cleaned and sanitized by a professional laundry service.**

Other things to note
With two cottages on property, if you are traveling with friends, see my other listing. It's called "Cozy Cottage by a little mountain stream".

This two level suite consists of two bedrooms, full bathroom, and a spacious tv/living room with kitchenette. A locked door at the end of the hallway leading to the host's residence ensures your privacy. Plenty of room to spread out, get comfortable and relax. Free off street parking.

The no contact suite includes two bedrooms, a full bathroom, washer/drier on the second floor and a full living room/TV room with kitchenette on the first level. Cozy cottage perfect for two or a serene retreat for one! Ideally located in the popular North Asheville area. Truly 10 minutes to downtown, but seems a world away in the woods. Choose to enjoy coffee or cocktails on the open deck or the shaded porch while listening to the sound of the petite waterfall and stream next to the cottage. The cottage is located on 50 privately held acres and guests are invited to explore the woods and stream behind the house.

The space
Sam's Cottage is the reincarnation of an what may have been a Mill, later an barn, then an Appalachian home. The building has been completely renovated for modern convenience and style, but the original pine floors and wormy chestnut paneling were salvaged to grace the home.

Guest access
Access to a washer and dryer, located in the garage below, are available upon request.

description:

Relax on the furnished screen porch, or in front of the outdoor fire bowl, walk a mile to West AVL's shops & breweries (it's not far, but it is uphill), or grab a 10-minute Uber to downtown.

The space

The studio has a queen bedroom, a private bath with a shower, a separate livingy area/sunporch with a futon & tv, a furnished screened porch, open outdoor deck space, a kitchenette with a dining table & chairs, fridge, single burner, microwave, coffee maker, bar sink, and a full set of dishes & utensils.

Kick off your shoes for an acupressure massage on the river rock floors in the luxurious bathroom. Seasonal nesting bluebirds!

The space

The home is well taken care of with all high-end comfortable furnishings, including a library. You will also find backgammon, dominos, and cards. Guests have the entire lower floor to themselves. We love our occasional nesting bluebirds, and some of our art reflects our affection.

The kitchen will be equipped for you to cook up easy meals during your stay. (The WNC Farmers Market is just 2 miles away and open 7 days/wk from 8-6. Grocery stores are within a mile.) So when you arrive, look up at the porch ceiling and you'll see the "haint blue"! We invite you to stay in our church house, one of the most unique and charming Airbnbs in Asheville.

The back door is accessed via our remodeled back deck where you will find a stone fireplace and large TV for guests to use. This outdoor space is kept under video surveillance for our safety and for that of our guests as well. The space has very large french doors and three windows, which flood the area with natural light during the daytime. description:
Escape to this 1928 two-bedroom cottage filled with artistic and antique charm. This is truly a unique space that has been lovingly remodeled with heart and handmade custom furnishings. Cook a delicious meal in or order out.

There is a sunny deck to enjoy your morning coffee or an evening beverage at th

We are just 5 minutes south of the Blue Ridge Parkway (191 entrance) and Bent Creek, and only 15 minutes from downtown Asheville and the Biltmore House. We are close to the French Broad River as well, where fishing, tubing, and float trips are the perfect way to cool off on a summer's day. If you're into hiking or mountain biking, this is where the trails are.

Large windows and spacious decks with wooded views make this a uniquely peaceful oasis equally close to the fun of the city and the beauty of the surrounding mountains.

You literally can’t beat our fantastic location. In the middle of all the excitement - great bars, coffee shops, breweries, restaurants, the newly reopened art museum, Pack Square, Civic Center - all are within a short walk from the Urban Nest. The entire space is yours. This is a separate apartment from the house above a detached garage. Very private and quiet.

This doublewide has been transformed into the sweetest little cottage you've ever seen. Conveniently located on a wooded lot just ten minutes' drive to downtown Asheville, this curated 3 BR/2 BA charmer features a fireplace, covered AND uncovered deck. Pet friendly and one mile to grocery. You'll love it!

The space
This is a three bedroom, two bath cottage-style home set on a sloping, wooded lot. The master bedroom is quite large with an en suite bath. The second bedroom is plenty comfortable as well. Both have full size beds. The third has a twin daybed that expands to full when needed; this room also functions as a TV room. This keeps the emphasis on socializing in the kitchen/living room.
It's just under 1000 square feet, and not a single inch is wasted. Artfully and eclectically curated, with a full complement of kitchen amenities and a covered deck provides bonus space during warmer months.

Guest access
Great news! When you stay

name: 2 Bedroom Condo - Blocks From Downtown Asheville
description:
2 Bedroom Condo - Blocks to downtown Asheville. Sun filled open layout with 2 queen beds, wifi, TV, hardwood floors, granite counters, stainless appliances, open dining area-living room-kitchen, located in the 5-Points/ Montford area above the bar "Little Jumbo". 1 block from High-5 coffee shop and 5-Points Diner. 3 blocks to Whole Foods and Trader Joe’s. Easy 5 minute stroll to downtown Asheville. Located on 2nd floor of building.

The space
Comfortable, Super Convenient, 2nd Floor (No Elevator). .

Guest access
Walk to Downtown, Stroll Through Historic Montford , and Enjoy Walking The Greenway. On street parking. 1 block from coffee shop and diner. 3 blocks from Whole Foods and Trader Joe’s

Other things to note
Some construction noise next door. The cocktail bar downstairs closes between 11:00pm-1:00am.

name: Sunny Mountain Dwelling in W. Asheville
description:
Enjoy our clean and bright tucked away haven in West Asheville!
Great for outdoor adventurers, downtown explorers, foodies, families, fitness lovers, off-the-beaten-path goers, sight-seers...
LGBTQIA+ friendly.

Living space includes private entrance, 2 bedrooms, 1 private bathroom, living room w/ breakfast bar and kitchenette. We also provide quick breakfast items, tea and coffee, on-the-go snacks, and filtered water.

We would love the chance to welcome you to our home!

The space
One-story 70s bungalow style house tucked away in a quiet residential area. Filled with lots of lovely natural light.
Under 10 minutes drive to the heart of West Asheville, 12 minute drive to downtown (~$11 Uber ride), close to Blue Ridge Parkway and countless hiking and cycling areas, 15 minutes to Biltmore Estate or the NC Arboretum, 20 minute drive to Asheville Airport.
Enjoy seating in the quiet fenced-in side yard - great for kids or fo

name: Ideal for couples/solos-COZY & CLOSE TO DOWNTOWN!
description:
Looking for a quiet, cozy & relaxing place to stay in Asheville you have found it! While my guests can come & go without us meeting, I enjoy getting to know them, that's what AIRBNB should be about!
PLEASE NOTE- this is an-law unit in my home, not a hotel. Quiet hours are from 9 PM to 9 AM. For a variety of reasons the listing is not really appropriate for young children (deck, noise issues). PLEASE REVIEW LISTING RULES & MESSAGE ME W/QUESTIONS BEFORE BOOKING.

The space
This listing is located in a residential neighborhood. It is a separate in-law unit in
a quiet home. Please respect the neighbors right to the quiet enjoyment of their homes. The rules and guidelines that I have developed for this listing are designed to ensure that everyone is happy- guests, host and neighbors! : )
Hang on the awesome deck and have local craft beer! Bathroom has a shower.
Kitchenette for light cooking, featuring Breville Counter Oven, Coffee Maker

name: Pet-Friendly Upper Berne in Asheville!
description:
This pet-friendly (dogs only) rental is the upper portion of a duplex, tucked in the tree tops, yet just 3 minutes from the middle of Asheville! (It's not recommended for young children as sound carries to the lower unit.) A large front porch with a grill, and a side porch add to a tree house feel. We supply all linens, towels and robes. You'll receive cookies from Judy's Well-Bred Bakery & Cafe as well as a $10 gift certificate and treats for your pup.

The space
The Upper Berne Chalet has the location you want when visiting Asheville, with the feeling of being far away from it all on a hillside, yet literally a 3 minute drive to downtown Asheville. There are two spacious bedrooms and one shared full bath. The combined living/dining area is open, comfortable and cozy with a large 52" TV in the living room. The kitchen is fully stocked with coffee, tea, condiments, spices, pots & pans, dishes and utensils. There is a large front porch with table, chairs and a

name: The Cottage at Winghaven—A Stunning Woodland Paradise
description:
Cozy up by the wood-burning stove in this new, light-filled log cabin. Enjoy complete privacy and gorgeous forest and seasonal mountain views while still being close to Asheville. Minutes to restaurants and shops, but away from it all!
Well behaved pets are welcome!

name: Houz Zen: A Pet Friendly Private Suite
description:
Enjoy everything that the Asheville area has to offer! Our private ground floor suite boasts a separate entrance and offers a comfortable space to unwind. The peaceful fenced in backyard is perfect for you and your pet. Guests tell us how ZEN our indoor and outdoor space feels. What's more, we are super pet friendly! We have NO pet fees for up to 2 pets however we hope you will ensure your pets are not destructive.

We look forward to having you as our guest!

The space
Entire lower level of a private residence. Completely separate space with your own private entrance. Private patio included along with a 3/4 acre fenced in backyard leading to a small creek! 1 bedroom apartment with a queen bed, 1 bath, free WiFi, 60" Plasma, Blu-Ray DVD player, YoutubeTV with Starz, Showtime, Netflix, Amazon, Chromecast, etc., convenient location to Airport, Asheville, Brevard, & Hendersonville. Guest parking space provided. Owners are both ex hotel managers

name: One Block North of Downtown AVL!
description:
Views of downtown Asheville and a peek at Mt Pisgah are yours from this renovated apartment above Alpha Real Estate just one block north of downtown! Enjoy your stay with chic urban feel and walk to all the festivities. This spacious two bedroom unit will spoil you with every attention paid to detail. Modern decor and classic features. Relaxing, romantic master bedroom with a 4 poster king bed. A terrific home base for all your WNC adventures!

The space
The top floor of this 1912 home is yours! The home was restored by a master craftsman with fashion forward decor. The blend of old and new will delight you. Covered back deck with private entrance. This will be your favorite downtown spot with everything at your fingertips!

Guest access
One parking spot in our lot M-F 9-5. After hours up to 3 cars - must be moved by 9 am. Extra parking on the side street. Thanks!

Other things to note
You will be emailed a code throug

name: Nice forested spot 5 minutes to downtown Asheville
description:
This charming, mid-century home is located just 1.4 miles from downtown. Close to everything, centrally located and yet on a quiet mountain road with mature trees, privacy, and wildlife! It is the perfect home base to explore all Asheville has to offer.

Enjoy a mountain escape within a few minute's drive of downtown, the River Arts District, West Asheville, and the Biltmore Estate.

We take coronavirus seriously and disinfect the home thoroughly between all guests following Airbnb's protocol.

The space
The home has an open floor plan with a sunny kitchen and dinette. There's a comfortable living room area with large windows looking out into the trees. A door off the dinette opens right onto the deck. Sunlight comes over the mountain and into the kitchen and deck for morning coffee.

The deck overlooks the yard and mountains beyond. The home is on a quiet road. We have Carolina Chickadees, Tufted Titmouse, Red Cardinals, Blue Jays

name: Cozy studio in hot West Asheville.
description:
Our apartment is located in a safe, friendly neighborhood a short walk from all there is to enjoy in West Asheville, and only a short drive from downtown.

The space
We have a comfortable and sunny room with a queen platform bed and love seat, as well as a Roku t.v. and books to enjoy. The private bathroom has a tub/shower combination. We provide some essential toiletries, a Keurig coffee maker and water kettle, coffee and tea, fresh towels and soft bedding. To enhance your comfort during this unusual time, we’re taking extra care to disinfect frequently touched surfaces between reservations.

Guest access
West Asheville is full of small shops, bars and restaurants - lots to explore and enjoy. You can walk to everything from here. There is a grocery store a 5-10 minute walk away. You can park in our driveway, just in front of the studio stairs.

Other things to note
Please be aware that our BNB is attached to our house.

name: Our Little Getaway
description:
+++Now equipped with a full house UV-C ultraviolet sanitizer in the central heat pump system so the air exchange is always cleaned of viruses and bacteria!+++

Come enjoy our fully furnished little getaway in E. Asheville just 4 miles from Downtown, minutes away from the Blue Ridge Parkway and many breweries. Our place is also convenient to lots shopping areas.

The space
We are offering a sweet, newly renovated 400+ square foot apartment. There is lots of natural light. Brand new full kitchen with granite countertops and equipped with cofee maker (with coffee), microwave, stove, pots, pans, dishes, silverware and a lot more. Kitchen has an island for more storage with a breakfast bar. Full bath with shower and tub. Super comfortable organic new queen-sized Murphy bed that is combined with a special couch. TV with Roku. Shared laundry room which has your closet and dresser for clothes. Plenty of storage for longer stays.

Guest

name: Top Floor Condo in the Heart of Downtown
description:
To check availability for tonight, please send an inquiry.

The space
This two-bedroom, two-bathroom condo features 13 ft high ceilings, and huge windows with abundant natural light. The master bedroom is an en-suite and features a king size bed. The second queen bedroom is well separated from the master and next to the hall bath that includes a tub. There is a comfortable living area, full kitchen with separate dining area, washer and dryer, dishwasher, and microwave.

The Altamont Condos is located on historic Church Street in the heart of downtown. The street is tree lined and full of beautiful old buildings including three historic churches. The location is ideal, being close to everything downtown and the street is off the high traffic streets, so it is quieter than nearby Patton Avenue.

This building was originally constructed in 1895 and renovated in 2010. The historic character of the building was preserved so it continues to

name: RV by the creek. 10 Min. to West Asheville
description:
RV by the creek. 125' from the house in the blueberry patch. Horse pasture across creek. Portable fire pit stocked with wood. Camp chairs and table. Your own little world to explore Asheville from. When not singing or playing tennis am usually around gardening. My wife, Laura is a hike leader and has a counseling practice. Parking leaves a bit of a stroll to the RV and we have a luggage-carrying wagon to help. Basically one bed, but dinette can fold down to make a small additional bed.

The space
We're on 2 acres facing a creek with big gardens in the back. You're in a cozy RV with all the amenities way out in the front yard by the creek in the blueberry patch.

Guest access
The big front yard is yours. Portable fire pit with wood supply, camp chairs, outdoor table, dip your feet in the 4' wide creek. Tours of the gardens in the back by appointment if you'd like. Cows in the pasture next door and horses across the creek to keep

name: Quiet Bright Bedroom Close to Downtown
description:
Quiet bedroom nestled in the hemlocks in an adorable bright and sunny bungalow in North Asheville, 1.7 miles from downtown (40 minute walk via the greenway, or a 5 minute Lyft). Walking distance from the North Asheville Farmers Market, hiking trails and the Botanical Gardens, UNC Asheville, breweries and restaurants. Enjoy a fire in the firepit on cool evenings!

The space
This private room has a queen bed, dresser, and two closets. All common areas are available for guest use.

Guest access
Please make yourself at home in all of the common areas...which is everywhere except the second bedroom and the basement.

All amenities in the home are available for guests to use. This includes wifi, all kitchen appliances, coffee and tea. Please note that we do not have a TV.

There is a lovely front porch to sit and read books on, and firepit in the yard that guests are welcome to use.

Other things to note
Wh

name: Comfortable downtown Studio. Walk everywhere.
description: This newly renovated well lit coffee Studio offers wonderful natural light from large windows High ceilings and a full-size kitchen. Has a comfortable seating area, flat screen TV, coffee maker, and everything you need to cook basic meals.

name: QUIET, COMFY & CLEAN ~ Near Downtown & UNCA!
description:
You will have private access to one half of our clean, comfortable and quiet home in North Asheville. Two beautiful, spacious second floor rooms, private Bath and a fantastic location for visiting the area!

Relax on our large front porch complete with rocking chairs. Enjoy the garden, fruit trees and large quiet yard that gives a feel of country in the city!

Conveniently located 1.3 miles from Downtown, an easy 10 minute walk, with great access to I-240 and I-26 less than 1 mile away!

The space
Two spacious, well lit, private rooms available on the second floor with a private bathroom, living room and entrance. The Yarrow Room contains one queen bed and sleeps two. The Loft Room is a bit larger and contains a queen bed and a double futon. The Loft Room will sleep four people. Private bathroom is located between the rooms off the landing.

There is a third room off the landing that is our private space, though at it's entrance y

property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
name: Comfortable private room in historic B&B
description:
This is one of our most popular rooms located in the Northwest corner of the second floor. It has a silk upholstered queen bed, beautiful pine floors, and warm beige hand-plastered walls. Antique furnishings are complimented by beautiful art work and luxurious bed linens. The bathroom is a generous size, as it was original to the house and has been modernized with a shower.

The space
The Lion and the Rose is a Queen Anne style home dating back to 1898.

There are only 4 rooms and 1 suite. All come with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and DVD players. Some also have fireplaces and original features, including stained-glass windows.

Amenities include a 2 course cooked breakfast, free parking and a DVD library, plus a complimentary welcome beer upon arrival :)

Guest access
Large wraparound porch, backyard fire pit, wildlife certified garden, two communal parlors, 24/7 guest pantry with refrigerator, freezer and microwave

property_type: Private room in bed and breakfast
name: Large king suite with private balcony and soaking tub
description:
Whether you're looking for a romantic Asheville weekend getaway, or a longer vacation option, the luxurious Craig-Toms Suite is the perfect setting for your needs. It has two rooms that offer privacy and space for a group to gather. It can accommodate three adults with the king bed and mahogany daybed.

A large TV, gas fire place, and oversized comfortable chairs await weary travelers needing some down time. The suite is the only room on the third floor, so your privacy is guaranteed.

Through the original stained glass door, a private balcony awaits you, providing fresh air and beautiful natural light.

The suite also has it's own refrigerator for your convenience.

The luxury bathroom offers a soaking tub, skylight, and large walk-in shower.

The space
The Lion and the Rose is a Queen Anne style home dating back to 1898.

There are only 4 rooms and 1 suite. All come with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and

name: Mountain Moments Retreats
description:
Relax in this spacious 4 bedroom, 3 bath home in a quite neighborhood only minutes from downtown Asheville. Centrally located so you can access, hiking, biking, breweries, retail centers, the Biltmore Estate and all the entertainment and restaurants that downtown has to offer with no more than a ten minute drive.
This spacious home is perfect for families as it is on a half acre lot with a fenced -in yard and it is only minutes from a local park and playground.

The space
~Four Bedrooms
~3 queen beds, 1 full bed, and 1 twin bed
~Huge Master Bath with stand up double headed shower and large separate "jetted" tub
~Huge Walk in Closet
~Large guest bath with shower
~Direct cable
~Blue Ray Player
~Board Games, card games, and coloring books for all ages
~Washer and Dryer
~ Kitchen with granite and stainless ksteel appliances
~ Coffee Maker
~Large Flat Screen in living room
~All linens and towels

name: Amazing Mountain View close to Biltmore, Downtown
description:
Private Suite with views of Blue Ridge. Minutes to Biltmore Estate, River Arts District, Downtown Asheville, and the Blue Ridge Parkway. Home is green built, but located in historic Kenilworth neighborhood. Enter through the private patio entrance. This is the lower level of our home so you will hear us in the morning when we get our coffee. Listen to the brassy train horn when it passes through the Village. St. Anne's Church chimes the hour and half hour.

The space
Sit on the patio and look over the Blue Ridge. At night, the Village lights twinkle through the trees. Bring your slippers in the winter as the floor is polished concrete.

Guest access
You will have the entire lower level to yourself. Park across from our home, and follow the sidewalk around the right side of the house, to a sliding wooden gate under the deck to your private patio.

Other things to note
Kenilworth Inn lies at the top of our street.

name: Avl Getaway: Beautiful & Spacious 2 Bedroom Suite
description:
Get the best of both worlds: enjoy the uniqueness of Asheville’s most treasured neighborhood and enjoy being only a 5 min drive from Asheville city center. Our private entrance ground floor suite has all you need to explore. At only a short 1.5 mile neighborhood drive, you will be close to everything in town including breweries & restaurants.

Our unique space is filled with our own art and items from our world travels and is equipped with local coffee and beer so you get a taste of our city.

The space
We follow all regulations to make sure our space is up to cleanliness standards set by Air BNB and CDC to keep our guests

Check out our property on @avlgetaway

Our fully private suite is on the ground level of our new green-built home. We travel around the world for work and pleasure and have decorated our suite with items from East, South, and West Africa, the Middle East, Europe, antiques from our family, and paintings from ou

name: Charming Historic Cottage on NE edge of downtown.
description:
Welcome to 1898 Clover Cottage (on the National Register of Historic Places). The two story cottage is located in the beautiful and enchanting Albemarle Park neighborhood in North Asheville. Our home stay room is an octagon shaped room of truncated turret architecture located on the ground floor just off our lovely large porch. The cottage is furnished in an eclectic mix of mid-century modern and victorian era furniture with a queen bed in your room. All nice people are welcome here.

The space
Your hosts, Anna and David are available by phone or text and on-site most of the time (we live on the second floor and work quietly at home). You are welcome to relax on our front porch with coffee, tea, or a glass of wine and watch the sunset over the mountains. Anna is a Licensed Massage, Reflexology, and Craniosacral Therapist and likes to bake goodies to share. David is also a LMBT and artist/photographer specializing in (1860’s civil war era) wet plate collodion, tint

name: Merry Heart Homestay
description:
Modern and cozy studio space in the historic neighborhood of Montford. The space is well lit and comes furnished with a comfortable queen size bed, refrigerator and 2 burner cook top stove. There is also an adjoined yoga room that is available, per request. The rental also comes with off street, driveway parking. Walking distance to all of the neighborhood restaurants (Nine Mile, Chiesa, All Day Darling) and downtown Asheville.

The space
Close to everything! Not only is downtown Asheville right there but also less than 5 minutes away is the beautiful botanical gardens of UNCA, the French Broad River and the River Arts District!

Guest access
There is driveway parking for guests right next to the coded entrance into the home. No stairs!

Other things to note
Though there is a washer and dryer located in the bathroom, this is NOT for guest use. Should be noted for men who are over 6’ that the ceiling height is low in cert

name: Mountain Views & Hot Tub at Reeves Cove Cottage
description:
The house was built in 1927 and was originally located on the Biltmore Estate Dairy Farm property. It was moved to this location in the 1950's. It is a cool quirky place with lovely mountain views from the bedrooms, back deck and yard. Interior décor is in "Fixer Upper Farmhouse style". House includes a Hot tub, fire pit and screened porch for our guest to enjoy.

Need more space? Rent together with our tiny house or with our Blue Bird Cottage.

The space
Our house is a 3 Bedroom, 2 Bath nearly 100 year old cottage that has been updated with todays modern amenities. There is a family room, formal dining, sun room and screened in porch. The master suite has a living area area with a couch as well as a king sized bed and sliding doors to back deck.
There are Mountain View’s from the bedrooms, back deck,hot tub and fire pit.
The house is in a rural area but is just 5 minutes to the grocery store, 10 to Asheville Outlet Mall and 20 minutes

name: Country Setting - Minutes to Downtown Asheville
description:
Entire home conveniently located 10-15 minutes to all Asheville has to offer.
7.8 miles to The Biltmore House, 7.4 miles to downtown Asheville, 12 miles to airport and 45 minutes to Skiing.
Spacious family room with wood fireplace , Roku TV and High Speed Internet. Dining area seats 8. Kitchen is well appointed for 12 guests. 3 bedrooms on main level. Huge bonus room sleeps 6. Grill area for outdoor enjoyment.
Perfect for multiple families to vacation
No pets allowed

The space
4th bedroom / bonus room features queen size bed, 2 double futons with coil mattresses for extra comfort. Large screen Roku TV, Blu ray player, dvds, games and books. Separate zoned heating and cooling.
Child safety gate and pack and play for infant sleeping. Perfect for kids sleeping/recreation area or great for a whole family to have private sleeping quarters.

name: 1 Bedroom Apt. Historic Montford (2/4)
description:
Spacious downtown apartment in 4-unit historic Montford home. Fully equipped kitchen & furnished; linens provided.
There are 3 other units that have other guest living in them. You won't share any common space with them. You will have a parking space in the gravel area in back.
There is a TV in the armorer in the living room, along with Charter WiFi & cable TV.
It's only a short walk to downtown where you can find award-winning restaurants, entertainment, coffee shops, breweries, & shopping.

The space
This downstairs apt. has been newly painted; there is new tile in the kitchen and bathroom. Completely renovated kitchen with new appliances. Very comfortable seating; flat screen tv is in an armoire in the living room. It's a perfect haven for 1 or 2 people who enjoy walking or biking the two blocks into town or to the grocery store, people who want fast access to the incredible hiking and mountain biking available here, as well as sight-seeing. Ash

name: Cozy Basement Suite: 5 minutes to town or mountain
description:
Private basement suite, ideal for couples or solo traveler looking for a cozy nest located 5 miles to downtown and 3 miles to BRP, trails and mountains.

Private entrance through garage. Bedroom with queen bed, full bath, living room with couch, recliner, dresser, Apple TV, Netflix.

Uber/lyft ranging from 10-15 dollars to/from town.

We are a young family of four that lives in the house above suite. We will offer the utmost privacy to guests. Available for questions/suggestions.

The space
Our home is is nestled in a wooded neighborhood convenient to the asheville adventure of your choice.

The suite is a recent basement renovation and provides a cozy resting place from all the Asheville adventures.

We are located just 5 miles from the heart of downtown and 3 miles to the blue ridge parkway and Mountains to Sea trail. Other nearby attractions of interest; Grove Park Inn resort (4miles) Biltmore Estate (10m

name: Whole House Sublet 30+ Night Stay 10 Mins to AVL
description:
This listing is for a monthly sublet. We have a minimum stay requirement of 30 days. Come relax in our cozy suburban home with spacious open split floor plan. Comfortably furnished, jacuzzi bath tub, gas fire place, back deck with grill and patio seating/dining, front porch with rocking chairs, one car garage and driveway parking, wi-fi. Less than 15 minutes to downtown Asheville, Biltmore Estate and the Blue Ridge Parkway.

The space
Enjoy the comfort of a whole house in a quiet neighborhood. The home is located one minute from I40 which provides easy access to Downtown Asheville, Biltmore Estate and the Blue Ridge Parkway.

Guest access
Guests have access to entire house and property with the exception of a small bedroom that remains locked during your stay.

Other things to note
The house includes latest edition of local newspapers and entertainment guides, tourist brochures, local hiking guide books and map with dire

name: The Sanctuary - Walk to New Belgium & Downtown
description:
The Sanctuary is a comfy, unique vacation space with private parking and access to a welcoming outdoor patio deck. Located in the River Arts District of Asheville, directly across from New Belgium Brewery and Tasting Room, The Sanctuary offers a relaxing retreat!

We're also within 1.5 miles of both Downtown Asheville and West Asheville, so if you're adventurous, you can walk the whole city!

The space
The Sanctuary is comfortably equipped with:
- Queen bed
- Loveseat
- A Roku smart TV with Netflix, Hulu, and other streaming capabilities. Just link to your account!

name: Asheville Cottage in Historic Montford 30 Day Min
description:
Welcome to my entire cottage in the Historic district of Asheville known as Montford. Enjoy the comfort of your own place for your vacation while exploring the many adventures that the area offers.
You can easily walk to the vibrant and exciting downtown Asheville to people watch or attend live theater, visit art galleries, shop in the many eclectic stores, or dine at one of the over 65 restaurants! Known as the 'Paris of the South'.

The space
Sink into a king-size luxury mattress after a fun- filled day of adventures. A walk-in closet with additional shelving is quite roomy. A brand new trundle with two luxury twins are welcoming at the end of the day. High thread count linens and towels provide a level of comfort for guests. And the bedspreads are freshly laundered before each guest arrives. Even the pillows are sanitized between guests or replaced.

Guest access
This home has everything you need and then some for an enjoyable visit.

name: Tiny Home Nestled Under Large Trees near Downtown Asheville
description: Stay close to nature in a rustic getaway perched on the edge of a wooded property. Listen to wildlife at night from Adirondack chairs. Awaken to birdsong filling the mountain air. Indoors is an ingenious use of space that offers every comfort.

name: Aunt Betsy's bedroom & bathroom with private entry
description: Previously known as the Rankin House Inn B&B, the home (circa 1843) now has a single king bedrm & private bath for rent. Aunt Betsy's rm is full of charm & history with the added privacy of it's own entrance and balcony. The loc. just north of the city in historical Montford, cannot be more convenient- only 3 walk-able blocks to d/t AVL. Walk to dinner, breweries, art studios alike. The Grove Park Inn & Biltmore are within 2 mi. of the house. Come enjoy the quite serenity of Aunt Betsy's Rm now!

name: AVL Sunshine Daydream House 6 Miles from Downtown
description:
This eclectic and charming 1950's bungalow has just been lovingly remodeled for your enjoyment.

It sits on the West side in a quiet neighborhood just on the outskirts of town. Convenient to I40, just 17 minutes from the airport, 13 minutes (6 miles) to downtown, 15 minutes to Biltmore, 15 minutes to UNCA and 10 minutes to happening Haywood Rd.

Clean, comfortable and stylishly funky with lots of windows to let in that sunshine!

Great for families, small groups, and four legged friends!

The space
Pets are welcome and we have a fenced in yard, so bring your well behaved furry friends. Please let me know if you do plan on bringing pets.

There are 3 bedrooms total (all new mattresses): The 2 downstairs rooms both have queen beds (and a small porch off one), and the finished attic has a king bed and a couch that converts to 2 twins. The twin beds can be a pain to make up so please let me know if you'd like this done for you

name: Serenity Cottage w/HOT TUB & Courtyard, 1 mi<BRPW
description:
Quiet, Cozy, Private!!! Hot tub, full kitchen for 4, outdoor courtyard, TV with Roku, and wifi. Located 1 mile from NC Arboretum, Bent Creek River Park, & Blue Ridge Parkway. Just 15 minutes from downtown Asheville and Biltmore Estate. This stand-alone house is located in a quiet, safe, & rural neighborhood. The space has modern furnishings and is decorated with an outdoorsy National Park theme.

The space
Bent Creek is the most popular place to mountain bike in Asheville! Bike from your front door or drive 1 mile to Rice Pinnacle Trailhead and explore the Pisgah National Forest! Or park at Hardtimes Trailhead and walk the NC Arboretum trails or hike thru a rhododendron thicket to Lake Powhatan! Have some fun with the pool table and enjoy the beautiful views from the living room and the balcony. This property is an established rental with great reviews, but a new listing due to new management. Eleven can stay here but one will sleep on a twin in a loft, and two on the sofa.

The space

Access to entire space.

Friendly dog who may bark some and 1 cat on property.

Surrounded by flowers, vegetable gardens, trees, and lots of birds, this spot is a few blocks from three good restaurants, and downtown Asheville is only a mile away.

It's a unique spot for a getaway, a quiet place to read, rest, write, and work, and well located for exploring the diverse attractions of the Asheville area.

The space

There is an electric teapot, a Melita coffee pot, and an assortment of teas and coffee, as well as a minifridge and microwave, if you want to breakfast in. But you will probably want to try the breakfasts at nearby All Day Darling as well.

Guest access

Our home has a comfy living room with a sectional sofa, dining area with seating for 6, a fully equipped kitchen and a tiled bath with a tub/shower combination. The entire home has wood floors and is professionally decorated. The walls are decorated with antique theatre posters.

The home has plenty of parking, has a great deck and a large fenced yard for you

description:
This is the luxurious "lady of the house" King size bedroom.

The Azalea has west-facing windows overlooking the koi ponds, and guests in this room often take advantage of being lulled to sleep by the sounds of the pond.

Guest can enjoy the remote controlled gas fireplace in the cozy seating area.

The pink marble table tops in the room mimic the bathroom vanity, which dates back to 1899 and was hand-carved by the father of the acclaimed author Thomas Wolfe.

description: This elegant suite feels like a glamorous 18th century French boudoir with its pale blue and gold color scheme, antique velvet sofa, vintage clawfoot tub, and glittering frosted glass chandelier. The kitchenette nook is perfect for an early cup of tea or a late night mug of hot cocoa. You would never guess that this is a pet-friendly room, as our staff cleans with great attention to detail to ensure that no trace is left behind of our furry guests.

name: Dogwood Room - Black Walnut Bed and Breakfast Inn
description: This unique room has the distinction of being where Sandra Bullock stayed while filming the movie 28 Days. Our home was used as a set for this film as well! This is the turret in the house and has an antique clawfoot tub with shower conversion and a quirky little study with built in bookcase and comfortable reading chair. The Queen-sized bed area has a marvelous Gaugin-inspired nighttime sky, with burnt copper clouds and a crystal chandelier.

description:
The Ivy Room (Bed & Breakfast) is the ultimate romantic Asheville get-away. The luxurious room has a 2-person 110 gallon Jacuzzi tub, King-sized feather bed, working fireplace, and air conditioner.

Our guests may enjoy a full three course breakfast from 8:30 - 9:30 am. Welcoming Afternoon Tea. Complimentary beverage from 5 - 6 pm.

With off street parking and easy access to downtown Asheville (0.5 mile walk to downtown) our Bed and Breakfast is a perfect place to stay in Asheville.

In the summer, open the north facing window to enjoy a tranquil view of our gardens and waterfall. In the winter, light a log in the fireplace, pull up one of the antique armchairs, and sip on a cup of hot cocoa. The small but dramatic bathroom transforms into your own private spa - with the push of a button, activate the steam shower and relax.

Dressed in shades of buttery yellow, burnished browns and reds with an eclectic mix of antiques and fine furnishings, The Magnolia is a delightful room with its brass chandeliers and stunning bath with large shower. This guest room offers the kitchenette with microwave, sink, mini-fridge (with ice maker) and small dining area. Facing the covered terrace is a sitting area, flat screen TV and all of the comforts of the main house.

1928 charm with original features, all the modern updates and our artistic style.

Did I mention our location is Epic?!

description: Two side by side flats that mirror each other in central downtown,  newly renovated flats are a great pick!  Well-designed space with skylights, high ceilings, large windows, and all modern amenities.  Closest listing to the center of downtown.   Legal City-Inspected listings

description:
Brand new. A two minute car ride, or a 15 minute walk to West Asheville’s bustling Haywood Road, “The Jewel of the Springs” is the perfect location for you and yours to enjoy the best of what Asheville has to offer. Step into a modern, relaxing , 1000 sq.ft. abode of style and comfort. Enjoy the spacious inner realm-designed with your pleasures in mind. Your private deck provides the perfect setting for morning coffee and evening drinks. Let your vision take in the large backyard-yours to enjoy!

The space
“The Jewel of the Springs” is a brand new, luxurious apartment that provides a retreat-like setting you will want to linger in and enjoy.

It is close to everything you want to do in the Asheville area, including dining, breweries, gorgeous hiking, and the Biltmore Estate only 15 minutes away. Wifi 440/20 for working from home.

description:
It's Spring in Asheville!

The perfect place to explore all Asheville and WNC have to offer. Whether an outdoor adventurist to the business traveler this home fits all of your amenity and location needs. Our home offers endless warmth by way of its modern furnishings and charming decor. Spacious and stocked kitchen, dining area, airy and inviting living room, and cozy patio with grill. This is a brand new development located off the highway to anywhere, new homes currently being built!

The space

Your front patio opens to a small flower garden. After a day of sightseeing and adventure, cook a meal in the fully equipped kitchen, watch a movie, get cozy by the fire, enjoy fresh fruit from the garden (blueberries & figs when in season), or just relax and enjoy! Fast 440/20 wifi for WFH.

Our home is tucked off a quiet street, surrounded by an oasis of plant life.

Our cozy downstairs suite is the perfect home base for exploring all that Asheville has to offer! The home is located on a quiet residential street a few miles from restaurants & shops on Haywood Rd. and 10-15 minutes from downtown. Whether you want to cruise the Blue Ridge Parkway, get out in nature, or discover local breweries & art (or all of it!) — this is the spot to recharge until your next adventure! 2br/3 bed layout works well for small groups, families, couples, girls' weekends & more.

The Baying Hound Campground is about 10 minutes from downtown, yet still on the edges of rural, agricultural Asheville.

THE CAMPGROUND

This stunning property is surrounded by trees, wildlife & sounds from the FB River. We live in the house upstairs and my in-laws live in the other apartment down below. We’re all *fully vaccinated*. Although your stay will be private, we are here to help if need be, but respect your space and solitude.

description:

Breakfast is included in the main Inn each morning or there is a full kitchen that allows guests to be on their own schedule and prepare breakfast at their leisure. Grocery stores are conveniently located near our Guest Cottage. Cuddle with one another on the sitting room couch beside the fireplace, or go for a leisurely soak in the two-person Jacuzzi hot tub that soothes beneath a fabulous piece of modern art.

In the bedroom, a king-size bed beckons beside a second fireplace.

The space
Private Porch

Pet Friendly $50 fee

The Walt Whitman Garden Spa Suite is the very essence of elegance, with its handsome king size mahogany bed, soothing blue French toile and imported Italian tile. All of it is accented by the original 1889 stonewalls at our luxury Asheville bed and breakfast.

Toast one another with champagne before slipping into the luxury spa for a soak in the two-person Jacuzzi.

Shower with two heads and steam room.
fireplace in bedroom and bath

this suite offers you a fresh and calming private retreat. Then gaze at the 1889 WhiteGate Inn’s award-winning garden from your private perch on the suite’s rocking chair porch.

At the end of the day, soak in the two-person Jacuzzi and refresh yourself with a separate shower and body sprays. This suite comes equipped with a refrigerator, coffee maker and microwave along with other must-have modern amenities such as 40” HDLCD flat screen TV with DVD and wireless Internet.

description:
The centerpiece of this elegant suite is its king size canopy bed, a replica of George Vanderbilt’s bed from the Biltmore Collection. Savor its luxurious look and feel, then kick off your shoes and crawl beneath the covers. An 18-foot vaulted ceiling soars above a stacked stone fireplace, adding elegance to this statuesque suite. Flip the switch on the gas logs and cuddle in the cozy glow with your companion. Then step outside on the suite’s rocking chair porch and take in the front row view of downtown Asheville twinkling against the backdrop of the western mountains.

This suite, with its old English feel and old world elegance, maintains all manner of modern amenities from wireless Internet to a 40” HDLCD flat screen TV with DVD player and CD player. Set high up in the trees, the woodsy feel is reflected in the suite’s décor, from dark taupe accents to its oak and metal furniture and pounded metal lamps. Cuddle with a companion on the king size bed, admiring its soaring canopy of wood and iron. Then turn on the gas log fireplace and bask in the glow, as you sip a glass of wine or two.

Admire the leafy greenery just beyond your window, as you relax in the bathroom’s two-person Jacuzzi and separate shower with body sprays. Then step outside on your private rocking chair porch and delight in your sweeping view of downtown Asheville and the western mountains. A private entrance lets you come and go as you please.

You feel deep in nature, but you're only minutes from the best Asheville has to offer. Enjoy the evenings in the screened in porch or stroll across the foot bridge in front of the house. Wolf Laurel and Cataloochee are WNC favorite ski stops. Hot tub and Fire pit await you after a fun day of play. Have a pet? No worries, we have a fenced in backyard! ($15.00 pet fee/per pet/day).

The space
The bedroom is big enough for a family of 4 if the kids do not mind a queen air mattress.
The screened-in back porch has a grill. A fire ring in the back yard. Washer, Dryer, Dishwasher, Microwave, Fridge is all yours if you wish to use it.

Bedroom~Kitchen~Living Room~Dining Room~Front Porch~Back Porch~Back Yard~Hot tub

description:

The area boasts a beautiful Lake and back trails to the Blue Ridge Parkway. 2 miles to Golf Course, Shopping, Starbucks, Gas, and small restaurants are about a half a mile from the course. The heart of Downtown just 3 miles from there. Grove Park Inn is a 5-minute ride. The Biltmore house is 10 minutes away.

The space
Your room is huge, 25ft by 20ft. It boasts a desktop workstation, fridge microwave and large Jacuzzi tub in the bathroom. Enjoy nature around our back yard fire pit or soak in the newly installed 6 person Hot Tub! The screened-in back porch has a grill, bar, and couches with heated space units. Feel free to prepare meals in your full kitchen. The dining room is gorgeous and the living room fireplace is loaded with wood. The Blue Ridge Parkway and walking trails are just a 7-minute ride from the house.

Guest access
Available for your use is the entire house..not

Enjoy solitude on the expansive deck and screened porch or have a locally crafted beer as you unwind around the fire pit or enjoy the small garden and nearly 1-acre terraced yard. We are located 5 minutes from Bent Creek Park and it’s vast mountain biking / hiking trail system-also 5 minutes from the Blue Ridge Parkway and outlet shopping.

Asheville nights trend cooler so relaxing on the porch is where we spend a good amount of time. Chill around the fire pit and tiny frog pond located on the upper portion of the yard. For your convenience, we provide lighters, fire sticks and some limited wood.

Our kitchenette has a hot plate, small oven, & coffee pot with organic coffee and tea, and a few breakfast staples.
We have a smart tv and a desk space for any office work you may need to do. This is a pet friendly listing.

Please see our other listings here!
