The Loft at Deer Crossing is one of two Airbnb’s on our property. Your space is through your private front door, up the stairs to a private suite with a bathroom and morning kitchen. It is a part of our main house, but it is separated by a door that locks.

Guest access
Besides your suite, you will have access to our laundry room, a half bath, a front porch, and a fire pit. If you need to use the kitchen, it can be made available to you.

name: Asheville Mountain Cottage/Accessible
description:
The Bluebird Cottage is a newly constructed modern studio cottage located on a beautiful wooded mountain lot in the Shope Creek area of east Asheville, NC. This private home in the trees is minutes from Pisgah National Forest where hiking and biking trails are plentiful. Downtown Asheville, the Blue Ridge Parkway and Warren Wilson College are in close proximity. You get the best of Western North Carolina with a quiet mountain home close to vibrant downtown Asheville.

The space
The house features a private deck with mountain views, all new construction, new appliances and large windows for enjoying nature. The open studio floor plan and bright natural light invite you to stay in to enjoy nature or be drawn out to the deck for dining under the stars. The home is welcoming to guests who have mobility concerns. The home includes a handicap ramp for access to the home, a beautifully designed walk-in tiled shower, a wider door frame for accessing the bathroom and an

name: Private Artsy Guest Suite, walk to W. Asheville
description:
Our guest suite is colorful, peaceful, and cozy. You'll be enchanted by the original artwork and unique handcrafted items. Luxurious linens on a new king bed, local fresh roasted coffee, and a charming patio overlooking a wooded park will make you feel right at home. It’s a short drive to downtown, the River Arts District, and walkable to West AVL and a creek trail. If you are looking for a quiet, comfortable getaway close to it all, book with us!

The space
The guest suite is on the lower level of a home. There is a private patio, fully equipped kitchen, large bedroom, a desk for remote working and fiberoptic cable internet, a comfy sofa and Smart tv. There is an interior door between the suite and a downstairs den that remains locked; no one will enter the suite from the main house. Parking is on the street, and the private entrance to the guest suite is around back of the house (approx 30 yards). There is pathway lighting along the walkway but no flood lightin

name: The River Nook✨A Tiny Refuge
description:
A bright, new, custom tiny home welcomes you for your visit to Asheville!
The River Nook is a magical refuge and starting point for all your Asheville area adventures! The careful thought and attention to detail that has been put into every aspect of this space, paired with the prime North Asheville location (within walking distance to a French Broad river park and lovely coffee shop) is sure to make this your future go-to vacation spot in the mountains.
All are welcome here:)

The space
The River Nook is a custom tiny house, built from the ground up with the needs of of guests always in mind! Wake up in the cozy sleeping loft on the cloud of a bed to the view of the surrounding forest. Make breakfast in the full kitchen stocked with local coffee, local tea, creamer, sugar, honey, and organic oatmeal for your use. Soak in the view at the bar seating and set out on your daily adventures!
The River Nook is a completely self sufficient tiny house with

name: Eco-Friendly Clean Spacious Suite near Town/Trails
description:
Private, modern green built suite in North Asheville near Beaver Lake, bird watching, UNCA, Grove Park Inn, Blue Ridge Parkway and 2 miles from downtown. Queen bed, comfy living room, private bathroom, kitchen, yoga space, and outdoor patio. High ceilings and tons of windows let in the natural light that give a sense of calm and serenity. Peaceful property and walkable neighborhood. Driveway parking. We look forward to welcoming you to our home!

The space
This Green Craftsman was built in 2019 and is just a short drive from all that Asheville has to offer. Within 10 minutes driving distance from some of the most visited places in the city, this home will plant you in the middle of an outdoor adventure paradise. We are a very close drive to the Blue Ridge Parkway, Beaver Lake, Arboretum, and the Biltmore.

Our home has the character of a Modern Retreat in a quiet neighborhood, but with zen, relaxing comfort. There is a lovely outdoor space to hang ou

name: Beaverdam Bungalow
description:
In this colorful bungalow you’ll find new and vintage furniture and decor collected over the years, and local hand-blown glass. The open concept floor plan, screened-in front porch, and large fenced-in backyard make it easy to gather with friends and family.

The space
It was built in 1903 and was the neighborhood dance hall. My husband and I love the history and when we renovated in 2017 to open up the space and vault the ceilings, we had to showcase the original wood beam we found. You'll also notice the extra-large door frames which cover the log frame construction.

The three bedrooms are cozy but well appointed, each unique and full of color, with thoughtful touches and 60s vibes.

The galley style kitchen is stocked with everything you need for cooking and baking. It boasts a gas range, deep stainless steel sink, dishwasher, full size fridge with an ice maker and filtered water. You’ll also find a blender, an automatic drip coffee maker

name: Private Basement Suite Close to Biltmore & Dwntown
description:
Your perfect place to see and experience everything Asheville has to offer. The Biltmore Estate and Biltmore Village shops < 2 miles. Downtown Asheville < 10 minutes. The famous River Arts District < 5 miles. Jump on the Blue Ridge Parkway for hiking trails and mountain views in mere minutes. Private entrance to the Basement Suite, Private driveway and covered parking. Large Master Bedroom, Second bedroom/sitting room with TV, Blu-ray, Fridge, Coffee Pot, High-Top Table and Wi-Fi. Book Today

The space
Master Bedroom has Comfy Queen Bed, dresser, vanity. luggage rack, white noise sound and closet. Second bedroom has Twin bed turned couch, TV with blu-ray player (with NETFLIX access), various DVD's, books on the area, fridge, microwave, coffee maker, high-top table with bar stools, luggage rack, white noise sound and closet. Oatmeal, snacks and coffee provided. The bathroom has walk in shower and large sink vanity. Towels and washcloths provided.

name: The Studio at 217
description:
The Studio at 217 is tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in as-yet-to-be-discovered East Asheville. This cozy, light filled space is attached to a corner of our handmade log home, with it's own private entrance and lots of off street parking. Our property abuts Blue Ridge Parkway land, so it's a short hike on a clear trail through the woods to the Mountains-to-Sea Trail or the Parkway. The Studio is 15 mins from the Biltmore, just 12 mins from downtown, and one mile from a local grocery store.

The space
The Studio is fully private and well appointed, with everything you need for a comfortable stay in our beautiful area. If you want to eat in one night, our fully equipped kitchen has everything you need to make a meal. We provide coffee, tea, sweetners, 1/2 and 1/2, breakfast bars, fruit, and instant oatmeal for a light breakfast. Also basic cooking condiments: pepper, salt, and oil.

Guest access
The Studio is fully self-contained with it

name: The Woodfin - Chateau de Bro & Chalet de Bae
description:
THE SPACE IS ALL YOURS!

The Woodfin is a chateau de bro, chalet de bae, camp for champs, and home for the roaming adventurer. Nestled in a quiet neighborhood just a 5 to 7-minute drive from downtown, this private dream pad is the perfect hub for couples, friends, and family to explore everything Asheville. Recharge in the high-end Tempurpedic TEMPUR-Cloud® bed for an unbeatable nights sleep! Fully equipped kitchen. Professionally cleaned!

The space
DESIGN
Enjoy a minimalist aesthetic inspired by Scandinavian design with undertones of low-key surfer vibes. Crisp, white walls and large casement windows maximize light and warmth. Natural elements of wood, wool, and iron add intrigue and texture to the space. This homey abode invites you to relax and enjoy your company.

PARKING AND ENTRY
Complimentary off-street parking for two vehicles is located in front of the house. Guests enter using convenient keyless entry. Please do not block t

name: Country feel -15min to AVL and close to Pisgah
description:
Watch the sun rise over the mountains in our beautiful home! 10min drive to the Blue Ridge Parkway, and only 15 to West Asheville/20 to downtown. Nature trails nearby are great for running/biking/hiking in Pisgah.
Home is bright and clean, fully stocked kitchen and two porches to drink your morning coffee/tea!
We have 2 of the sweetest dogs on earth and one little kitten. We do keep them out of guest rooms for cleanliness/privacy. Enjoy local recommendations out or a private campfire out back!

The space
Spacious and warm even in the winter cold! Eat-in kitchen, full bathroom, and cozy living room, with record player, piano, and lots of other instruments.
Your room is the guest room closest to an entrance to the house, and you are welcome to all shared spaces as well. Elizabeth and Madeline are your hosts, and we can provide local recommendations for foods/brews/hikes/climbs in the area.

FYI- If you would like to bring your pet please

name: Asheville  Zen Cottage
description:
Peaceful Mountain Cottage over 100 years old. Sits on 1.5 acres, just north of Asheville. My grandfather built this house for my grandmother & their 9 children. It is filled with charm & nostalgia. Original hard wood floors, bead board walls & ceiling. Front porch for watching my 3 goats play, an afternoon sunset or enjoy conversation with those dear to your heart. Sit in the gazebo to enjoy a good book, beverages or watch the night sky bring out the stars for your amazement.

The space
Unplug from television & technology to reconnect with your family and all that nature has to offer around you. Relax - Recharge - Reconnect. No TV/wifi. Enjoy a simpler time. Puzzles, board games, adult coloring books & cards available for those games you remember from your younger days.

Guest access
Guest can enjoy all of the Cottage and the property (1.5 acres). There is a Gazebo and plans for a fire pit. The "Girls," "Abbey", "Bailey", & "Chloe"

description: Want to have an historic experience in beautiful Asheville?  Welcome to our home in Albemarle Park, a Nationally recognized Historic Neighborhood.  Built in 1913, this Tudor style home is walking distance from downtown Asheville, the Grove Park Inn as well as coffee shops and local restaurants.  Freshly updated with private entrance and driveway, enjoy relaxing  around our firepit, walking our neighborhood roads as they wind their way up the mountain or heading downtown.

name: Cozy & Charming Asheville Cabin: 5 Mi to Downtown!
description:
Head for the hills of North Carolina and stay at this 2-bedroom, 1-bath cabin while exploring the Asheville area. Located just 5 miles from the city, this vacation rental puts you in the middle of national forests, breweries, the Blueridge Parkway, and the distinct culture that Asheville is known for. Spend your day out of the house at the Biltmore Estate or touring Sierra Nevada Brewery, then return home to your cozy cabin to make a meal and enjoy a beverage as the sun sets.

The space
Washer/Dryer | Newly Remodeled | Family Friendly

Perfect for couples looking for a quick getaway or families visiting UNC Asheville, this cabin has all of the amenities that you would find in your own home while being close to Asheville’s best attractions.

Master Bedroom: Queen Bed | Bedroom 2: Queen Bed

INDOOR LIVING: Hardwood floors, flat-screen TV w/ Roku, Bose speaker, ceiling fans, dining table, laptop-friendly workspace
KITCHEN: Well-eq

description:
Adorable & newly remodeled SPACIOUS 1 BD/1BA located in the Asheville Bear Creek Campground & RV Park. Fairly private w/ huge back deck overlooking the mountains of WNC. Perfect for 2 people, but great if you have 2 children to put them on the futons in the LR. We do accept pets with an additional charge. Swimming pool, playground, dog walk, and much more. Very large and bright 1 bedroom suite with a full bathroom, full kitchen, and plenty of space

Regular Coffee Maker, NO Keurig on site

The kitchenette is stocked with spices and cooking oils, an electric kettle, slow cooker, drip coffee, and fridge. While there's NO range/stove, we hope the options we provide can assist in creating easy, no fuss meals.

Enjoy the view of mountains with a horse farm in the backdrop and occasional family of deer crossing the path, while sipping your coffee on the covered porch in the pristine forest location. Nicely appointed home features views, fully equipped kitchen, hi speed wi-fi and 55” tv.

The space
If you an outdoor enthusiast, you will love the hiking, mountain biking, road biking, kayaking, white water rafting, snow skiing and horseback riding just minutes from the cabin. A regular drum circle, organized by residents in Pritchard Park, is open to all and has been a popular local activity every Friday evening.

Guest access
Full access

There is a $75.00 pet fee for one dog, each additional

The space opens up to a private, covered balcony with open views of the woods and cr

Quirky is the name of the game in popular West Asheville. Everyone has their own unique angle on everything. Our space is a private studio suite, with its own entrance and outdoor seating area, decorated with some mid century flair, accessed through our beloved gardens, which have been featured on the West Asheville Garden Stroll twice. Memory foam topped double bed, perfect for 1 or 2 people. Homestay permit.

description:
If you're looking for that cozy cottage feel, Cottage 19 is the space for you! Getting around is as easy as a stroll, bike ride, Uber, or drive through gorgeous historic neighborhoods surrounded by charming Asheville ‘wildlife'.... bunnies, possums, cardinals, oh my! Something to catch your eye around every corner.
Minimum 30 day rental based on local laws. Roughly at $50.00 per night

description:
This spacious, cozy apt is located in Asheville's scenic historic district. We specialize in long term, pet friendly stays. Main level apt has 2 BR, 1BA, and a roomy office; perfect for remote working guests. Enjoy the charming front porch, back balcony, and fenced in yard. The apt is conveniently located within walking distance to eateries, park, greenway, downtown, UNCA, and botanical gardens. Come relax in this lovely home if you are relocating, or just getting away for fresh mountain air!

The space
Full disclosure, our house was built in 1925 and, over the years, has evolved into a triplex. That is, there is an apartment on the top floor that is privately accessed through the door/staircase on the left as you face the house. The main apartment (your space) is located on the main floor and is accessed through the door on the right. Private bedroom and bath with tub on main level.

Workspace, mini fridge, and microwave provided.

The space
Homestay Permit 19-08216

Bedrooms, bathroom, and front porch only. Kitchen and living room are off-limits to guests.

Please bring your own kitchen items to use with provided microwave and mini fridge.

If you have a love of makeup or muddy places, please bring your own towels.

Other things to note
The space is ideally suited for shorter stays, with guests out of the house most of the time sightseeing or attending conferences.

I have two hypoallergenic Siberian cats, one is social and the other one hides.

Welcome to our peaceful & spacious home away from home in the mountains! Located about 15-20 minutes to downtown Asheville & The Biltmore Estate in a quiet, country-neighborhood setting. There's plenty of space in this 3 bedroom house plus 1 bedroom apartment. Enjoy the view from the covered front porch with comfortable seating overlooking the large, lush & green front yard. BDRM 2: Queen bed & TV
BDRM 3: Queen bed

Accommodations are relatively simple and the house is priced accordingly. Most guests enjoy the outdoors and spend time exploring the city and surrounding natural environment, but the house is also a great place to spend time. Caretakers are on the property, but you'll have the entire house to yourself.

Our 3 bedroom 2 bath home accommodates up to 8 people, with 2 queen size beds and 2 sets of bunk beds. It’s fully equipped with a large kitchen, breakfast bar, dining room, yoga/meditation room, washer / dryer, back deck with grill, and lots of natural light from the large bay windows and skylights.

There’s a TV with a complimentary Netflix account as well as DVD’s. There’s also an AUX jack where you can plug in your phone or iPod to play music through

10-15 minutes to Biltmore Estate.
10-15 minutes to downtown Asheville.

All paper products in the space are 100% recycled and we leave a compost bin for our guests to use for any unwanted food waste and recycle bin.

Modern luxury suite located in the WNC mountains, 8 miles from Asheville, 4 miles from the Blue Ridge Parkway and within 4 miles of grocery stores, restaurants, etc. Suite is very spacious with sitting area attached to separate bedroom. Ample seating including new comfy sofa sleeper. Many windows in both rooms to look out over the mountains. Includes Wi-fi, towels, linens, toiletries, Keurig, microwave and refrigerator, outdoor patio furniture. Well-behaved dogs welcome and cherished

The space
10 minutes from Interstate 40, exit 44

Guest access
Private bedroom, living room and bathroom

Other things to note
No smoking on premises. No littering. Please be respectful of our environment

name: Full Apartment Just South Of Asheville
description:
This is a cozy, newly finished basement apartment. 800 total square feet! Just 20 minutes to downtown Asheville and 10 minutes from AVL Airport! It is the full basement of the house with two separate rooms. One area is the bedroom with bathroom/kitchenette separated by a barn door to the TV\Office space area. The apartment has its own entrance with key-less access.

The space
Cats do live on the premises, so if you are highly allergic, this may not be the space for you.

There is only one parking spot available.

The walking path to the apartment is made of stone with a down slope. We would not recommended our rental for someone with a walking handicap. We also like to warn people it would not be possible to roll a large suitcase very easily.

name: Asheville Poolside Retreat!
description:
This West Asheville house with a private in-ground pool is available for the entire month of July! It sleeps 8. Three sunny bedrooms contain beds for 6; a living room couch provides a bed for two more. The house includes a remodeled kitchen, a large dining room, and a spacious living room. Guests also have full access to the large front porch, back yard & deck. This house is perfect for groups and families with kids. You can walk to shops & restaurants on Haywood Rd & to the French Broad River.

The space
The home is on a quarter acre and includes a grassy front yard and a back yard with a swing set, back deck, and in-ground pool. The door in the kitchen leads out to the pool and back yard. Another kitchen doorway leads to the large sunny dining room. The front door opens to a large living room, which is adjacent to the dining room, and stairwell to the bedrooms. Guests have access to two bedrooms and a bathroom upstairs and one bedroom and bathroom on the fi

name: Minutes to Downtown Asheville & Parkway.
description:
Location, Location, Location! This home sits perfectly between city and nature being 5 minutes to downtown and the parkways entrance. It is in a quiet friendly neighborhood. With great WiFi it is also great for working travelers. We have visits from black bears, hawks, foxes, & turkeys. The owner has taken great care to make the place feel like home. With the charms of the vintage Jukebox and video arcade games for fun.

The space
The screened porch has a celling fan and outdoor table and chairs to relax. You may even catch a Hawk or Bear sighting! We are so close to the parkway they can be seen wandering around the neighborhood sometimes, along with turkey, foxes and sometimes deer. Kitchen has stainless steel appliances. Refrigerator with freezer and ice/water dispenser, dishwasher and coffee cart with coffee and tea selections. The dining area has a beautiful blue ridge mountain mural that can also be seen from the living area. The living area has an L shaped

name: Candyland Cottage
description: Location Location location! Right off Smokey Park Highway allows for quick access to all Asheville has to offer. 15 mins to downtown Asheville, Biltmore House, Blue Ridge Parkway, Outlet Mall, Farmers Market.  Grocery, gas and drive through convenience store 1 block.  If the cuteness of the front doesn't get you, the backyard will. All fenced in for your pooch, pergola, fire pit, garden waterfall and fun time shed gives you even more space to enjoy your stay. Parking, wifi/cable and no pet fees.

name: Country home minutes to Downtown Asheville
description:
Spacious 4 bedroom, 3 bath home that’s close to everything you want to see in Asheville and Western NC! Whether you want to relax with coffee or a glass of wine sit out under the stars by the fire pit, this home has it all
Minutes from many fun, family-friendly activities. 15 minutes drive to Downtown Asheville
Close to mountain biking, hiking trails in the Bent Creek area and Lake Powhatan, tubing on the French Broad River and the beautiful Blue Ridge Parkway Plus enjoy many breweries

The space
Enjoy a Spacious and comfortable living room 4 bedroom home with 3 bathrooms Private street with only 4 homes in this quiet area, nice views from the deck and front of the house, ask about our next door home that is available if you have a big family or traveling with a large group, ask about my other home next door that can accommodate 6 people

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire home, Neighbors are very quiet,
Outside

name: The french cabin Asheville NC
description: My house is located in a quiet neighborhood, walking distance from  breweries. You can Uber to DT Asheville NC, few miles away! There is a nice deck where you can enjoyed a glass of wine, the whole place is furnished with french Antiques.

name: Lofts at Woolworth in downtown Asheville NC! #207
description:
Eight uniquely renovated, loft style apartments are now available in the historic Woolworth building. Lofts at Woolworth are located in the heart of downtown and have been crafted using a mix of industrial and luxurious touches, including top of the line cabinetry and appliances. Breathe in the mountain air from your balcony and enjoy a glass of wine while you observe the bustling city below. Markets, shops, bars, restaurants, breweries and the beautiful Blue Ridge Parkway await your arrival.

The space
Our New York style lofts are located on the second floor of the Woolworth building with easy stair access. We are a unique property offering guests personal assistance and are available to take luggage to your loft in our freight elevator upon arrival and departure. Our lofts feature fourteen foot ceilings, repurposed flooring, and lots of exposed brick and terra-cotta original to the building. "Walk the walk," downstairs in the Woolworth Art Gallery, and enjoy ou

name: Daybreak Escape- Quiet Beautiful Clean- Great host
description:
Modern, clean, private 1 bdrm, 1 bath suite with your own entrance, back porch, kitchen (full size fridge, range, sink, coffee setup), walk in-closet, sleeper sofa, HDTV, washer/dryer, lots of light.

15 minutes to downtown AVL. 5 mins to the Blue Ridge Pkwy/Folk Art Center, JBL soccer complex and Warren Wilson College. 5 minute walk to a secluded beach on Swannanoa River. Breweries, hiking and biking trails close too!

We'd love to welcome you to AVL and share some of what we love.

The space
Full kitchen, HDTV with Fire Stick, Laundry, a huge closet that can easily fit a pack and play ;) Quiet neighborhood with trails close by, easy access to the Blue Ridge Parkway and Folk Art Center, JBL Soccer complex, Warren Wilson College all 5 minutes away in quiet subdivison. Able to provide recommendations and guidance for biking, hiking and rafting if needed.

Guest access
Guests are welcome to enjoy their covered back porch.

name: A Suite Stay!
description:
Tranquil and private 1 bedroom suite in an updated private family residence. Upper and lower apartments both have their own entrances and are completely separated and do not share a common HVAC system. This home is on a cul de sac in a typical southern eclectic dog friendly neighborhood.

We are SUPER pet friendly with no pet fees for up to 2 pets! The suite offers a king bed, full kitchen, deck, big screen TV, gas grill, and much more! Close to hiking, breweries, shopping, restaurants.

The space
This comfortable space is very pet friendly! Enjoy a full kitchen, comfortable living room, bedroom with King Size bed and bathroom.
For entertainment the Living Room has a 55" flat screen 4K TV and the bedroom has 32" wall mounted television. Both televisions offer YouTube TV with over 100 channels including HGTV, ESPN, TCM, Networks and so much more. We also offer Netflix, Amazon Prime and Chromecast.

The safety and cleanliness of t

name: The Crown in North Asheville 201 *
description:
The Asheville Crown 201 is a spacious 2 bedroom/1 bathroom private apartment conveniently located near UNCA and downtown Asheville. The master bedroom has a queen bed, the second bedroom has a queen. The fully renovated kitchen is sunny and has a complete setup for those that like to cook. There is a laundry in your apartment for your use. The apartment has cable tv, roku and internet wifi. It's your home away from home.

Guest access
There is a private off street parking space available for your use as well as overflow parking.

name: The Crown in North Asheville 202*
description: The Asheville Crown 201 is a spacious 2 bedroom/1 bathroom private apartment conveniently located near UNCA and downtown Asheville.  The master bedroom has a queen bed, the second bedroom has two twins.   The fully renovated kitchen is sunny and has a complete setup for those that like to cook.  There is a laundry in your apartment for your use.  The apartment has cable tv, roku and internet wifi. It's your home away from home!

name: The Whole Enchilada **
description: Two apartments in the same building! Perfect for large or multi-family trips. Combined, the apartments can sleep 8: 4 bedrooms with 3 queens and one bedroom with twins. 2 bedrooms. 2 Kitchens. There are laundry rooms in each apartment.  Conveniently located close to downtown. One mile from UNCA.

name: The Retreat in West Asheville
description:
Welcome to our wonderful house in the heart of West Asheville. We offer a private, spacious basement apartment walkable to all the best spots West Asheville has to offer, such as Biscuit Head, Sunny Point Cafe, Westville Pub, Up country brewery, and much more. Our house is located just two blocks from the epicenter of Haywood Road where all the action is. We offer a newly renovated basement creating a cute and cozy space for you to enjoy your stay and take in all that Asheville has to offer.

The space
The space is completely private including it's own entrance with a covered porch and outside seating. The space has all the comforts of home and plenty of room to stretch out. Its the perfect size for two people or a small family. The main bedroom has a cozy queen size mattress, and the living room has a full size pull out couch with a memory foam mattress. When the pull out bed is not in use, you will have a small living room with a TV for you to relax and a dining

name: Wooded Studio and Deck! Close to Biltmore
description:
This cozy space is the entire bottom floor and deck of a three story home in a family neighborhood. While this apartment is private, you should know that a couple lives above you.

The newly finished downstairs apartment is warm and inviting. Relax on the deck or warm up next to the wood stove. The deck provides a private entrance, Summer treehouse vibes, and winter views. Enjoy an afternoon walk to local breweries (7 within 2 miles), shopping, or a quick Uber ride to Downtown (3.5 miles).

The space
We are excited to share part of our home with so many new friends. This cozy and private apartment is the perfect combo of tucked away and close to everything. Enjoy the neighborhood vibe as you sit on the deck in a forest of trees. This quiet road is home to families who love their neighborhood. Kids and the neighborhood cat roam the street (and sometimes bears), so please plan on a family friendly visit. We hope you'll love it, too. (Traveling with yo

name: "Out of the Blue"  West Asheville Sanctuary
description:
"Out of the Blue" Sanctuary, tucked away at the end of a street, is the hidden gem of West Asheville. Less than 5 minutes to West Asheville's vibrant Haywood Street or bustling Patton Ave. and 10 minutes to downtown Asheville. Furnished with modern elegance, the house boasts all the comforts of home. An expansive deck off the back of the home allows for the perfect gathering place, complete with a fire pit and seating.

The space
This home is entirely dedicated to guest space, with four bedrooms and two full baths. The master bedroom boasts a king bed and 50 inch Samsung Crystal UHD. There is a full bath with soaking tub, walk-in shower with rain overhead, and walk-in closet. There are two additional queen bedrooms with 43 inch Samsung Crystal UHD tvs, as well as a fourth bedroom with twin trundle beds and a nice office space. A second bathroom has a water closet with shower/tub combo, as well as double vanity sinks. Plant-based, naturally derived shampoo

name: West Asheville Sauna Retreat - Entire Ground Suite
Cozy, Pet-friendly 🐶🐈 Home, Backyard, Full Kitchen
description:
You will have plenty of space to recharge between adventures in the entire upper level and peaceful backyard of this home.

Set back from the road, you’ll have maximum privacy in this space. Cozy up with a book in the bay window or gather with friends around the kitchen island and open concept dining room.

Every window features a natural view. After a day of fun in town or on trails, crack one open by the fire pit with friends and family.

Enjoy the convenience of Asheville without the noise.

The space
Your space includes the entire main level of the house and the backyard. That’s 3 bedrooms, a full bath, half bath in the master, full kitchen, living room, dining room, large porch, and backyard with fire pit.

Note to dog owners! The backyard is not fully fenced in.

The basement level and garage are private areas as the owner lives on the property with her two indoor cats.

But I’m friendly if you need

name: Cozy house in a GREAT location!
description:
Cozy and private house in a great location in popular West Asheville. Convenient and close to everything. Amazing food, breweries, nightlife, and grocery. 15 minutes to downtown and Biltmore Estate.
The property features a huge backyard with lots of fruit trees, a swing set for the kids, super fast wi-fi, laundry, a desk work space in the living room and one in the bedroom, board games, cornhole, and a fire pit with utensils to make s’mores/hot dogs!

name: Remember When Cottage, Asheville
description:
Remember when the Platters recorded "Remember When" in 1956? What a perfect name for this cottage! Built in 1947, Remember When Cottage has been completely renovated and decorated in 40's and 50's style, but with all the modern conveniences. Go to youtube and type in "Remember When Cottage Asheville" for a 6-minute walk-through video. It's a comfy, cozy hideaway. Why not take a walk down memory lane?

The space
Note: As of October 2021 we have just finished the second major renovation and remodeling of the cottage. My wife and I have three vacation rental houses, but this one is my baby. In my retirement I'm having a great time decorating it in 40s and 50s style, and adding interesting antiques, knick-knacks, and retro stuff as I find them.

Another note: I just added a front porch swing! See photo.

Remember When Cottage may look like a house from the 40's or 50's, and it was in fact built in 1947, but don't be fooled! It's been compl

name: Country Charm Nestled Minutes From Downtown
description:
Enjoy everything Asheville has to offer in this newly renovated brick ranch in a private country cove. 5 minutes from the historic River Arts District and 10 minutes from downtown Asheville or the Biltmore House. Start your day enjoying coffee while relaxing on the covered porch in a rocking chair.

The space
Our home is completely furnished with a beautiful brick fireplace with gas logs. Enjoy a fully equipped kitchen including a full refrigerator, mircrowave, toaster, blender, crockpot, tea kettle and stove. All linens and towels are provided. Hairdryers in both bathrooms with soap, shampoo and conditioner. We strive to provide our guest with al the amenities of home. We hope you will feel welcome and truly experience our true southern hospitality.

Guest access
Guest have access to the entire house with the exception of the basement and one closet inside the house.

Other things to note
We love animals and your four-l

name: AVL Bear Haven
description:
AVL Bear Haven is nestled perfectly on the city's mountain ridge. It is only 3 miles down the mountain ridge to Downtown Asheville, 5.3 miles to Biltmore Estates and only 4 miles up the ridge to the Blue Ridge Parkway. Enjoy the tastefully designed unit with huge front deck and of course views of the mountains and lots of fresh air. You may see a bear, or two, occasionally so please be careful and do not feed bears! You will not be disappointed! Self Check-in.

The space
The house is a duplex. AVL Bear Haven is the upper unit with its own entrance and its own deck. Lower unit is rented separately. Parking is shared for both units.

name: Private n cozy little room
description:
This is a small and cozy room with a queen size bed, with a private entrance and a parking area. The door to the main house stays locked and there is no access from either side. Close to Biltmore park, the highway and 15 min from downtown Asheville. Great location and a great room for a couple. We would love to have you!

The space
This room includes a queen size bed, coffee maker, refrigerator, a full private bathroom and a smart TV

Guest access
There is a patio table and chairs by the entrance of the room that guests are welcome to use.

Other things to note
You’ll get a access code before check in to the private room and free WiFi

name: «Demi Sous-Sol Ensoleillé», 3 Rm/2.5 Bath for four
description:
One Block from the River Arts District and Central to all of Asheville's Best Attractions.

Spacious new construction Apartment Suite, with Private Entrance, in a centrally located, convenient and friendly Residential Neighborhood. There are Two Bedrooms, each with en suite Bathroom and queen-size beds. Plus huge Parlour with Kitchenette, Dining Area and Gas Fireplace. Comfortable, Quiet and follows COVID-19 sanitation protocols. Great for Escape "Staycations" or "Work from Anywhere".

The space
• “Vacation Escape to the Mountains” or “Work from Anywhere” visits with maximum privacy, convenience, and comfort.
• Top-Quality accommodations created during new construction (2019)
• Wheelchair Accessible
• Two Oversized Bedrooms with large South-facing windows
• Queen Sized Beds
• En Suite Bathroom, with heated floors, and Oversized Shower for each Bedroom
• Ample comfortable seating in each Bedroom
• Office Desks with Se

name: The Farmhouse at Wolfehaven
description:
Newly renovated 1925 farmhouse. Very private with easy access to all of Asheville’s best attractions and owners readily available for advice. We are 5 minutes to NC Arboretum, 5 minutes to Blue Ridge Parkway, 5 minutes to Bent Creek and miles of bike trails, 5 minutes to Asheville Outlets, 10 minutes to downtown Asheville, 15 minutes to Biltmore Estate, and 15 minutes from the Asheville airport. Hiking and Bike trails on property and a short drive to WNC’s best ski resorts. Come to the Mtn’s

The space
You’re tucked away in the middle of a 255 acre farm with Mtn’s and miles of trails for hiking and biking right out the back door.

Guest access
Private parking

Other things to note
If you will be arriving late, we offer a grocery buying service for breakfast items. Both a Keurig and a standard drip coffee maker are provided, as well as a tea kettle with a full selection of teas.

name: Private Elevator and Roof-top Patio, Four Story Townhome Downtown Asheville
description:
Beautiful four-story townhome located in the popular South Slope district of downtown Asheville. You will not want to miss staying in this luxury home that is equipped with a private elevator for convenient access to all floors and a roof-top patio that boasts mountain and city views.
You'll step right outside your front door to local breweries, restaurants, and spas while also conveniently located to the Biltmore Estate and the Blue Ridge Parkway.
Security cameras, for your safety, are located at the front and back exteriors of the property. This is a residential complex; please be mindful of your neighbors and refer to the quiet hours and HOA rules listed below:
The maximum number of guests occupying this townhome can not exceed 6 people. If occupancy exceeds 6, Towns Property Management, Inc reserves the right to evict guests.
No house parties are permitted in the home and there is a strict 10:00 PM noise ordinance. Violation of any property rules listed above

name: Walk to breweries, restaurants & music venues
description:
The house is right off the heart of Haywood rd. There are 8 breweries in the area, several coffee shops, bakeries and music venues within a few minutes walk. Numerous amazing local restaurants and bars to walk to as well.

The space
There is a nice front porch with a private entrance to a bedroom (queen size bed) with a full bathroom. A kitchenette with a mini refrigerator/freezer, microwave, and coffee maker, two bar stools to use at the overhanging counter and a chair with a back is available if requested.

Keyless entry for self check in.

Other things to note
Plenty of free parking on the street in front of the house.

There is a laundromat right across the street on Haywood rd should you need it.

name: Peace & Tranquility  in the Mountains of Asheville
description:
Nestled amongst the Appalachia and Blue Ridge Mountains this cabin is a perfect get away. Peaceful, tranquil, lots of hiking and abundant wildlife.Sense of 100 miles from nowhere, but only 8 miles to downtown.This cabin is unique-offered to Military members free upon returning home - to destress and reconnect.
When not enjoyed by Veterans, Air B&B fees are 100% invested in this 501(c)(3) Non-profit.
A wonderful opportunity to enjoy everything Asheville has to offer and help our Veterans.

The space
Newly built Cabin, sits among five acres at a dead end road. Property is surrounded by 300 acres of pristine forest.
Massive hiking and open space. Two fire pits, picnic table, flowing streams, wildlife and fruit trees.
We have intentionally left out internet and television.
Cell service is usually available.
Three miles from grocery shopping. Fifteen minutes from Downtown Asheville and Downtown Black Mountain.
What we love most

name: New tiny house in the heart of West Asheville
description:
Our tiny house was newly constructed in the spring of 2020 and is located in the heart of West Asheville. Just a short five minute walk to all the action on Haywood road and quick drive to all the beautiful hikes and attractions Western NC has to offer.

You will have one dedicated off-street parking spot (ample street parking near by for additional guests).

The space
A beautifully crafted home with vaulted ceilings make this tiny home feel extra spacious.  

When you're ready to take a break from all the hiking and brewery hopping come and take a nap on your sofa that pulls out to a full size bed (great for two kids or a couple that likes to keep it REAL cozy) or sit back and keep up with all of your favorite shows and movies on Netflix or Amazon Prime.

Ready for a snack? Your inviting kitchen is only a few steps away! A small but functional kitchen great for making simple meals and even better for heating up leftovers from the ma

name: Private Entry Guest Suite in Beautiful Asheville
description: This studio is has its own private entrance and private bath on the first floor of our home. It has a queen size bed, coffee/tea bar with fridge/freezer and microwave. Included Wifi, At&t TV, 1 off street parking spot in a quiet walkable neighborhood. It is very close to Biltmore Village, the Blue Ridge Parkway, and downtown Asheville.

name: Forest Edge Family Escape
description:
Escape urban madness and refresh your mind and body on the edge of the forest. This house is great for family and friends to enjoy Bent Creek Experimental Forest, the Blue Ridge Parkway, Lake Powhatan, the NC Arboretum, Bent Creek River Park and so much more!

Also a short drive to Asheville sights, eats and breweries. Walking distance to neighborhood trails for a run, bike ride or splash in the creek.

The listing is set for 6 ppl with a requested max of 4 adults/2 kids; infants also welcome.

The space
The house is a 3-story structure, the main and upper levels are accessible to guests. The basement and garage are locked and restricted to owners only.

On the main floor are located the dining room, kitchen, den/sitting area. The covered front porch has an outdoor table and chairs, and rocking chairs to watch the comings and goings in the neighborhood. Finally, from this floor there is access to the back deck with grill and the back

name: Vista View-Cozy & Relaxing Get-Away Home-Candler
description:
Well-loved quaint family home with free driveway parking as well as free second gravel parking lot. Spacious front and back yard with comfortable covered back porch to relax and enjoy yourself. Family-friendly neighborhood conveniently located close to numerous Asheville tourist destinations. Wifi and live-stream tv are available in the home.

The space
This is an older styled home with a cozy cottage feel. It is clean and organized.
The kitchen and bath have been recently renovated. The house is one level and has a basement access from the kitchen. The washer and dryer are located in the unfinished basement area. You will need to be able to walk up and down stairs if laundry access is a need during your stay. If you are searching for value, this is your house of choice! The home is not a fancy establishment but hosts provide excellent communication and offer all the basics you'll need and have extra special guest touches, too!

Guest acces

name: Like new!  Modern farmhouse, just 4 miles to town!
description:
Modern farmhouse cottage built in 2016. Private yet just 4 miles to downtown Asheville (2 miles to Biltmore Estate). Our 5-star vacation home has been in operation since 2016 - we've had it listed with VRBO/HomeAway - property #926417. While we are relatively new with AirBnB please search our property number at vrbo.com to see reviews from the past 4+ years. We are grateful for the hundreds of guests who have enjoyed staying with us thus far, and look forward to many more for years to come!

The space
Open floor plan, super comfortable mattresses/sheets, quality furniture and all of the accessories to make your stay easy and enjoyable. Spend time in the living room with gas fireplace or the game room in the upper level (50" TV, free Netflix) . Or, if you prefer the outdoors, enjoy the fenced back yard with patio and a fire pit surrounded by boulders & landscaping.

Guest access
entire house accessible for guests

name: Unique & Cozy Arden Cabin, 6 Mi to Blue Ridge Pkwy
description:
Hike, bike, and golf, or simply enjoy a leisurely vacation filled with dining, shopping, and scenic drives when you stay at this cozy Arden vacation rental. Centrally located near Asheville, this 1-bed, 1-bath cabin invites you to enjoy the sights and sounds of downtown Asheville, take a scenic drive along the Blue Ridge Parkway, or kick back at the local breweries, all within a short drive. When you're not out and about, enjoy beautiful afternoons on the lounge chairs by the fire pit.

The space
Prime Location | Free WiFi | Outdoor Seating | Pet Friendly w/ Fee

With splendid views of the surrounding forest, and a fantastic location near the area's finest attractions, this cabin is the perfect place for your next romantic getaway!

Lofted Bedroom: Queen Bed (via stairs)

OUTDOOR LIVING: Fire pit, charcoal grill, seating
KITCHEN: Well-equipped, cooking basics, coffee maker, hotplate, toaster oven, bar-sized sink, mini fridge

name: Tiny house
description:
this studio have shower toilet sink a full closet, microwave, two burner stove and five draws chest. private and gated is small jewel.

The space
new and very clean studio.

Guest access
can used the grill outside also a nice table with umbrella, very nice and peaceful.

Other things to note
closed to outlet mall and all Restaurants.

name: Asheville Log Cabin Hideaway-Minutes from Downtown
description:
Come for a mountain getaway in our newly constructed two bedroom cabin less than 10 minutes from downtown Asheville and the Blue Ridge Parkway. Enjoy a rustic mountain experience with the comforts of all new appliances, a fully-equipped kitchen, and a large flatscreen TV with Roku.

The location is tucked away in a peaceful, wooded cove where you will likely spot a wide variety of wildlife. After a day of exploring all Asheville has to offer, Homestead Hideaway is the perfect place to unwind!

name: Cozy West Asheville Apartment
description:
Private 1 bedroom basement apartment w/ kitchenette, bath, laundry & private entrance. Centrally located 1 block from shopping and restaurants on Haywood Rd. 1 Queen bed in bedroom, 1 Queen Sofa Bed in Living room. This is a humble dwelling for travelers on a budget not a luxury apartment. We are offering safe & clean accommodations for quiet & respectful travelers. We live upstairs w/ 2 dogs & we are generally quiet but sound carries so please note before booking. Safe & merry travels!

The space
Private one bedroom basement apartment with 1 queen bed in bedroom and 1 queen sofa bed in living room.

Strong Wifi.

Kitchenette with refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker, electric kettle, dishes, silverware, towels.

Private bath with whirlpool tub.

Onsite parking in driveway.

Private entrance and furnished back porch area.

Laundry on-site.

name: Oak Fern Cottage
description:
Located in heart of Fletcher on 3 1/2 acres just 20-30 minutes to all the must see destinations: Pisgah National Forest, Biltmore Estate, downtown Asheville, Chimney Rock, Hendersonville; less than 3 miles from Sierra Nevada Brewery. Let this be the relaxing place to land after your many adventures. Enjoy sitting on the porch or by the fire pit. Owners live on the property in a separate house.

The space
Open concept kitchen, dining room and living room with a front porch and back carport. Master bedroom has walk in closet and private bathroom with walk in shower. Two other bedrooms share 2nd bathroom with walk in shower. Both of these bedrooms have clothing armoires for storage.

Guest access
Entire home, front porch, front yard and backyard.

Other things to note
The property has many large oak trees and feels somewhat like a park. There are many birds and squirrels during the day and possibly raccoons, ground

name: Private+Clean Apartment in the Heart of West AVL
description:
Newly renovated private basement apartment with living room and private bathroom in the heart of West Asheville. Enjoy plenty of sunlight through garden-level windows and relax with a coffee or local craft beer on your private screened in porch. Five minute walk to Haywood road with some of Asheville's best restaurants, bars, coffee shops, boutiques, salons, yoga studios and so much more. Short drive to downtown, art galleries, and all the beauty of the Blue Ridge Mountains.

The space
Enjoy this brand new basement apartment with plenty of space to spread out. Your private entrance leads through a private patio to the bedroom with a comfortable queen sized bed. The large living room features simple, modern furnishings including a seating corner, a 40" Smart TV and desk. Your private bathroom has a double vanity and large bathtub ideal for soaking after a hike. You can easily reheat a meal, make coffee, or do laundry in the well-appointed kitchenette/laundry room.

name: Rustic Mt. Cove Farmhouse Minutes From Downtown
description: 30 DAY STAY MIN: Spacious yet welcoming 1875 farmhouse on 6 acres, the original homestead in a spectacularly scenic and quiet Appalachian cove 15 min from downtown Asheville and the Blue Ridge Pkwy (no highway driving).  Excellent gravel and road biking out your door, large field for frolicking, watching fireflies, or star gazing.  Frequent visits by deer, black bear, turkeys and bunnies. Nature, history, charm, peace and quiet so close to adventure! More photos coming!  (will discuss 6-12 mos)

name: Cute, Cozy, and Quiet
description:
Walking distance to bars, restaurants, and greenways! Located in a quiet residential neighborhood in West Asheville and minutes from downtown Asheville.

Fully furnished one bedroom apartment with bonus room. Newly tiled shower with tub. Kitchen has full sized stove, fridge, and dishwasher. Off-street parking and shared laundry.

The space
There is a covered porch by the front door where you can sit and watch the birds.

name: The Fieldtop
description:
Welcome to our retreat, nestled in the Garden of Arden. Convenient to the Blue Ridge Parkway, Asheville Regional Airport, Sierra Nevada Brewery, and downtown Asheville, you’ll be in the heart of everything.

You can start your day off sipping coffee in a bright sunroom or the evening in a relaxing bath located in a spa-inspired master suite.

Here, you’ll find a homey, welcoming atmosphere ready to be enjoyed.

Cozy home, lots of plants, a tranquil little getaway. I do have a 3rd bedroom with a single bed, but that is my daughters room and I’d like to keep that off limits. I live here full time and only offering my home for a brief time! Please treat it as you would your own.

name: ASHEVILLE COTTAGE 18-10
description:
Perfect cozy feeling in this newly renovated 1 bedroom 1 bath cottage which is one of two remodeled units within a duplex. This is the place for the mature adult or couple, either coming to town for work or vacation. This is not a space for parties, events or gathering over 4 people. Enjoy the bright private airy space with just about every amenity you expect and more! Centrally located in beautiful East Asheville across and on block from the VA hospital and entrance to the Blue Ridge Parkway.

The space
Newly remodeled from the roof to the crawl space! Clean and everything one needs when either vacationing or working in AVL! High speed internet, your own remote control to adjust the mini split AC/ Heat temp to your liking! Smart TV to load your own content or watch some roku channels. Your home away from home! Located on a dead end charming street. Getting around is easy... Uber, Lyft, bus or drive two minutes to the east where you will find the blue ridge parkw

name: Hilltop getaway in the heart of West Asheville
description:
Welcome to Holly Street Hill-top, the coolest handcrafted home in the heart of West Asheville. Located mere minutes from all the popular locations of the surrounding Asheville area, get ready to relax with all the cozy comforts of home, or go out and explore what the town has to offer. Featuring 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, entertainment room, and 2 scenic porches.

The space
Each room in the home is unique and offers a personalized touch with exceptional comforts. The funky living room has a large Smart TV for all your entertainment needs. An intimate dining area adjoins the kitchen where you can enjoy your coffee with the best morning light! Each bedroom has its own full bathroom. The second story is expansive, complete with a king bed, Smart TV, walk-in closet, huge shower with dual shower heads, office desk and a reading nook.

name: Colonial Revival in Proximity Park
description:
Newly remodeled 1917 three-story extended stay has everything for the discerning guest. Large windows let in plenty of light. Hardwood floors throughout. Its graceful lines and intricate details evoke the craftsmanship of a golden era. Modern kitchen with stainless appliances, stone counters, custom cabinets, and oversized island bring all of today's comforts.

The space
Master on main floor has en-suite full bath with tub and separate shower. Living room leads to large deck with outdoor dining. Main dining room leads into modern kitchen. Convenient half bath.

Upstairs there are three bedrooms and two full baths, as well as a sunroom with a workstation and pullout queen. Big laundry room with side-by-side washer-dryer.

Downstairs there's an additional bedroom and full bath. Huge, serene backyard.

Guest access
Proximity Park is hands down the nicest neighborhood in Asheville. Its evergreens and stone walls frame the var

name: Cozy Mtn Home, 5* Views,Near Biltmore, Asheville!!
description:
Getaway to our mountain house located just outside of Asheville, NC. A scenic drive up the mountain road where beauty and peacefulness await you at the top! Best part- the 5 minute ride down to grab coffee, groceries, or dine out...truly, an Illusion of seclusion.

The remodeled house features new flooring, new furnishings, and a new kitchen. Large deck overlooks the mountains and city lights; upper deck is perfect for enjoying your morning coffee as the sun comes up.

Come relax and enjoy!

The space
Visitors enjoy the two decks that view the mountainside; one off the master bedroom that is serene and peaceful for your lazy mornings! Our newly remodeled kitchen is well stocked with a plethora of pots and pans, utensils, spices and oils. Coffee center will get you energized for your active day!

We are 10 minutes for downtown Asheville, and 5 minutes from the Blue Ridge Parkway...wherever your day leads you, it will be simple!

name: Mountain Views Tiny Blue Home near Dtown/Parkway
description:
Perched on the top of a hill overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains & Hidden Flower Tiny Farm. A perfect pocket of peace! Feels a million miles away, yet you are only 5 miles to downtown & 4 miles to the parkway. Equipped w/ kitchenette, compost toilet, hot shower, comfy queen bed & gorgeous views. Big picturesque windows & doors overlooking the mountains. Huge double doors open up to a private deck and mountain stream. Perfect for yoga & relaxing~ Small, Simple, Sweet, Stress-free, Sustainable

The space
Please read the full description for information regarding staying in a tiny house.

This light and airy shipping container is mostly off-grid and great for eco-friendly thinking guests, who will treat this home with love and care. Take the weekend and UNPLUG with a great book. Lay in bed, and listen to the sounds of nature!

Kitchenette offers: mini-fridge, toaster oven, french press coffee maker, cooktop, and all your dining essentials.

description:
Beautifully curated studio apartment located in the heart of the Historic Montford area with all the modern conveniences. Featuring a queen bed and a kitchenette with a coffeemaker, toaster oven, microwave, and fridge. Living room with comfortable seating, access to wifi, Netflix, and Amazon. Enjoy a glass of wine on your private patio. Walk to "All Day Darling" for coffee or "Nine Mile" for a Caribbean dinner. A mile from Asheville downtown, Botanical gardens, and breweries. Parking available

The space
This is a completely private apartment, with its own entrance from the back Patio.
The spiral staircase you see in the pictures connects it to the main house with a door that is always locked. There is no access from this door to or from the main house.
For your convenience, please refer to the guidebook for some suggestions that might make your stay in Asheville more fun. ( It can be found under the location map )

We are located half-mil

name: Asheville Farm Stay Yellow Door Suite with Hot Tub

description:

Our property feels very secluded and removed from the hustle and bustle of Asheville- but is just a short drive from everything you will need while visiting. We are located 2 miles from the airport, less than a mile to Walmart, and just minutes from many local breweries and shopping plazas that include a large number of restaurants and stores.

The space
Enjoy your own private space including three cozy bedrooms; bathroom; spacious living room with 50" TV, WiFi and Netflix; string-lit deck with a dining set; large backyard; and a kitchenette including a dining table, water cooler, microwave, mini fridge, toaster oven, and coffee maker.

Other things to note
Kitchenette area does not include an oven or sink. There is a water cooler provided for fresh drinking water.

description:
The comforts of a cozy, updated urban home nestled in a safe, quiet neighborhood. Start your retreat now in Asheville suburbia.
This house is convenient to all that Asheville has to offer :
-Located just off the Sierra Nevada exit, approximately a $14 Uber ride away.
-12 minutes from Biltmore / Downtown Asheville.
-Around the corner from A/R workshop Arden - great for a girls weekend!
-Breweries / Wineries
-Apple Orchards
-Blue Ridge Parkway
-Hiking and Mountain Biking Trails
-Waterfalls: Sliding Rock, Turtle Back, Looking Glass, and many more.
-French Broad River - tubing, kayaking, fishing
-Lake Lure
-Appalachian Trail
-Numerous opportunities for shopping, arts, music, scenic drives and culinary delights
Updated kitchen and baths in 2019 - All new furniture and bedding.
BEDROOMS:
Bedroom 1: 1 King Bed
Bedroom 2: 1 Queen Bed
Bedroom 3: 2 Twin beds
Linen and towels included

name: Advantageous AVL Home Convenient to Mtns & City
description: Welcome to the Advantageous Asheville Home!  We are on half an acre of quiet peaceful land. Our four bedrooms are spacious and comfortable. The adorable living space is open and allows for a comfortable space to hang out. The kitchen is fully functional and provides a great place to prepare food. We are 15 minutes or less to downtown, the parkway, the mall, and wonderful restaurants. Fiber Optic WiFi is provided for stable internet with smart TVs in the living room and the master bedroom.

description:
Southern Living Interior Designer (My mother) helped with all of the decor and interior touches to this beautiful home. 7 Minutes to downtown! 2 minutes to Ingles and Starbucks! And a view of the mountains with no neighbors adjacent to the property.

The space
Exposed original 1930’s chimney, beautiful custom artwork throughout. Temperpedic pillows on all of the beds, Eddie Bauer blankets, and Amazon Firestick TVs in the house.

Guest access
Free Driveway parking. Fire pit access

Other things to note
Approximately 50 minutes to Cataloochee Ski Resort.

Approximately 45 minutes from Black Bear Snow Tubing.

Our home is 2 minutes from the French Broad River.

name: Walkable West AVL Home - Clean Comfy Contemporary
description:
Located just steps from New Belgium Brewing, the French Broad River and the walkable River Arts District, come and enjoy a brand new construction home built in 2021.

You will relax in a furnished bedroom with memory foam mattress and private bathroom with a shower and tub to yourself! You will have access to the full house.

Restaurants and breweries are plentiful in walking distance such as Wedge Brewing, Smoky Park Supper Club, White Duck Taco, Ultra Coffee Bar and Hole Doughnuts !

The space
The house is brand new and very contemporary. There is a large back deck with a propane grill that you are welcome to use. Lounging by the gas fireplace is always a great way to spend the morning and maybe even pick up the guitar to strum a tune!

I have two dogs that share the space but will stay out of your room unless invited. One is a 3 year old shepherd mix and the other is a 4 month cattle dog mix.

Guest access

name: NEW Inventive Asheville Container Home
description:
Come relax with friends and family and explore Asheville from this imaginative shipping container home. A short five minute drive will land you in the heart of all that Asheville has to offer.

The space

It is furnished with all amenities needed for longer term living. Walk to Pennycup Coffee House, Haw Creek Park, the new library, and Creekside Taphouse. It is located 4 miles from downtown in a lovely neighborhood a mile from the Blue Ridge Parkway. Please contact me directly for different date needs.

description:
Escape to the Blue Ridge Mountains and book a stay at the charming 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom vacation rental in Asheville! Take advantage of nearby outdoor attractions and spend your days hiking through the Chimney Rock State Park, shredding the slopes at the Wolf Ridge Ski Resort, or exploring the Blue Ridge Parkway. After, head downtown and enjoy a locally-brewed craft beer. Finish the night back at this cozy cottage relaxing on the private deck with your furry friend by your side!

The space
Free WiFi (50 Mbps) | Dog Friendly w/ Fee | Keyless Entry

Boasting all the essential comforts, this conveniently located cottage is the perfect home base for small families or a group of friends looking to get outdoors and explore the beauty of Asheville!

Bedroom 1: Queen Bed | Bedroom 2: Queen Bed

KITCHEN: Fully equipped, cooking basics, drip coffee maker, toaster, knife set, dishware & flatware
MAIN FEATURES: Smart TV w/ cable, 4-perso

description:
Azalea Cottage Retreat has excellent reviews and rates. The place to stay if you want to be near all Asheville has to offer!!
This sweet cottage is newly renovated with 1 bedroom, 1 bath and an open concept eat-in kitchen & living room. The bedroom has a comfy queen-sized bed, the kitchen is fully equipped with everything you need to prepare a large meal or a small snack, the bathroom has a washer/dryer and outside is private paved parking right in front.

description:
Relax in luxe comfort in our renovated 1965 traditional charmer. Our space boast a fun and quirky style that is Instagram worthy and will be sure to make your vacation memorable. This 2,700 square foot space, boasts two separate living spaces, pool table, fireplace, wifi, and gourmet kitchen. Our neighborhood has access right into the Pisgah Forest and is minutes to the Blue Ridge Parkway, French Broad River, and 15 minutes to Downtown. Spend your next vacation in style and comfort!

The space
Our beautiful abode is unique and lovely with a working fireplace, a separate attached mother-in-law space and a gourmet kitchen. Our home has the unique advantage of being close to everything. You have access to the entirety of the home with the exception of the garages and the attic.

Other things to note

description:

This 3/2 features a private backyard with an amazing pool area to keep everyone entertained. It will comfortably fit 8 guests. Relax poolside after mountain biking in the neighborhood, hiking on the Parkway, floating down the French Broad River, sightseeing at the Biltmore, or enjoying downtown Asheville restaurants and breweries downtown.

Other things to note
Pool is not heated. We keep it open as long as weather allows which is typically the first week or two in September.

name: New Luxury Condo, Downtown Asheville
description:
Stunning east city views, amazing outdoor space, and gorgeous contemporary design in this new-build, sunny and walkable condo in downtown Asheville. Access the private, 50-ft wide terrace from the living room in the condo via floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors. Wake up to peaceful mountain mist and coffee as you plan your day in Asheville. After enjoying what the town and surroundings have to offer, continue your vacation by relaxing in the condo with local art, and a fully-stocked kitchen. You can even catch the mountain sunrise while relaxing in the living room. The unit also provides 1 garage parking space. No detail has been overlooked!
Located on Biltmore Ave in downtown you are central to all that Asheville has to offer: shopping, restaurants, breweries, galleries, and live music venues. One block to Wicked Weed, two blocks to Curate. The Biltmore Estate and t

description:
"Welcome to our wonderful home with year round Mountain Views! Our two-level, one bedroom offers a comfortable getaway in a quiet neighborhood conveniently located to shopping and dining. Only minutes to Asheville, and Blue Ridge Parkway. We offer high-speed WIFI, cable, and access to streaming channels via Roku TVs. Plus a well-equipped kitchen for stay-at-home meals. The ultimate place to start your Asheville adventures with lots of extras to make you feel at home!"

The space
"Upstairs offers large bedroom with a king size bed, 2 large closets, desk/work space with amazing 2nd level spectacular views, and full size bath. Living area opens to comfortable wrap-a-round deck for relaxing and grilling. You will experience quite peaceful living with lots of wildlife" Due to owner being highly allgergic to cat's and dog's and for health reasons no animals are allowed.

Other things to note
House located at end of street. Very quite and private.

name: New Camper/ Trailer 5 min from Downtown Asheville
description: Come be our guest at the Rigsby house! We are conveniently located 3.2 miles from Downtown Asheville. This is a Small comfortable living space for our guests to enjoy.

description:

**This listing is for those interested in renting the entire inn and would like the house for just their party.

Steve and Karen are the innkeepers that live on the premises. We can provide daily breakfast but we can also allow you to have your privacy. The choice is yours :)

The space
The Lion and the Rose has two parlors, a large dining room, a large wraparound porch, backyard fire pit, and certified wildlife gardens.

description:
This beautiful private room with hot tub is located in a convenient location five minutes from the airport, ten minutes from the Biltmore estate and fifteen minutes from downtown Asheville. Whether you aim to see the town or hit the trails this location allows you to return from your day, take a cleansing hot shower and slip into the luxurious therapeutic hot tub. The property is a small urban farm and spa, so feel free to take in the flowers, produce and permaculture plots around the property!

Other things to note
Please be aware that a "private room" rental on airbnb does not mean the rest of the house will not be in use. It is my home and to expect me to not be here while you rent the private suite is unreasonable and unrealistic.

name: 2 Bedroom Quiet Urban Oasis; Mid-Century Charm
description:
Come stay in the beautiful Beverly Hills neighborhood! Located across from the 17th fairway of the historic Municipal Golf Course, it is one of the most walkable neighborhoods in Asheville. This spacious 2 bedroom mid-century home is an urban oasis. Sip your coffee amongst the trees and birds on the screened-in deck. There is a well-appointed kitchen should you choose to stay in after exploring the amazing restaurants of Asheville. Quiet neighborhood feel, minutes from the action of downtown.

The space
Enjoy the entire, separate upper level! I live downstairs with my sweet dog, Scout. She is a black lab mix and can be “chatty” sometimes so if you’re here during the day, you may hear occasional barking. She’s a great sleeper so you can count on a quiet night. Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions or concerns. The backyard is a shared space, Scout loves to sniff and play back there. There is a stairwell that connects the top of the house

This space offers a comfy queen size bed with with a mini-kitchen island complete with small fridge, microwave, toaster/griddle and coffee and tea kettle. The treehouse-like room is the upstairs of our home with your own path leading to side porch separate entrance. The upper deck is over

description:
Located in the historic Grove Park neighborhood on one of the most beautiful streets of Asheville, our home is 3 blocks from the Grove Park Inn, parks & restaurants. Live like a local with your 900 sq feet guest suite on the first level of our house with your private patio entrance. Beside your entrance, the English cut flower garden is yours to enjoy. 2.5 miles to the center of downtown Asheville. The mountains are waiting for you.

The space
You will enjoy your own private patio entrance with over 900 sq feet of guest living in the lower level of the house with natural lighting from french doors and bedroom windows.


The Paris themed suite is a wonderful place to relax after a day of exploring. Amenities include a stocked under-counter refrigerator and beautiful den with a large framed map wall featuring the layout of Paris in the 1600’s.

Asheville has been called “The Paris of the South” with Biltmore Estate, a thriving art scene,

The upper level has 3 bedrooms (including the Master Suite) with the remaining 2 bedrooms located downstairs. The home was totally remodeled in 2021 providing beautifully furnished spaces to enjoy with family and friends. It is truly a home away from home with easy access to all that Asheville has to offer.

The space

There is ample off street parking in the driveway and a cozy shaded deck off the front of the home. The neighborhood is very quiet and peaceful with very friendly neighbors.

Guest access
Guests have access to the full home and yard.

Other amenities include cozy king size bed, spacious bathroom with shower and bath, plus large walk-in closet with utilities.

The main floor of the building is now home to Highland Brewing, Bun Intended Street Thai Food, Peace Love Taco, Farm Dogs, Buxton Hall Chicken Shack, The Hop Ice Cream, and the Times Coffee Bar. You will not need to travel far to eat amazing food. Bun Intended is my favorite.

Guest access

The space
Upon arrival, step into the spacious living room with 65” smart TV, record player, bluetooth speakers and ample seating for your entire party. Welcome to the Sallie Lee Cottage! We hope you will enjoy your stay in Asheville in this charmingly renovated Historic Montford Cottage!
The Sallie Lee Cottage is amongst the oldest homes in Asheville and is believed to have been built around 1883. This amazing Cottage has been well preserved and restored to her former glory.
Located less than 1 mile from downtown Asheville!

The space
Proud to be a Victorian, the Sallie Lee Cottage is an exquisite example of the architectural wonders of the late 1800s. Around 1880, Sallie Lee built a stick-style Victorian cottage on Ashland Avenue. In doing this, she became the first woman to own a home in Western North Carolina. The cornerstone of this beautiful home centers around the exterior architectural displays of lines, angles, and ornate grids. Furthermore, the interior is equally exceptional, centering around its unique triangular fireplace; which results a distinct Latin cross floor plan.

The home

Enjoy friendly West Asheville during a stay in our secluded garden suite, tucked away on a quiet but convenient street with old trees, sidewalks, and lots of birdsong. Fireflies are active as of May 21, 2022!

The space
A lighted pathway will bring you from a dedicated parking spot to a verdant retreat. Enter via your own patio, which is adjacent to the shared fire pit and yard.

Inside you'll find a relaxing suite with a breakfast nook, seating area, beautiful modern bath, kitchenette, and large closet. The kitchenette includes coffee, tea, and a mini fridge.

Families are welcome to use the small play set with slide in the yard, and will enjoy Malvern Hills Park playground, just a block away. PLEASE INQUIRE about using an umbrella stroller, pack 'n' play with blackout cover, high chair, and other kid gear, we're happy to share with advance notice.

PLEASE NOTE: We live above the garden suite. You may hear running water, young voice

description:
Peaceful and fully furnished Bent Creek apartment - in the woods and close to town!

Right next to Bent Creek Forest and the NC Arboretum, this well-appointed apartment's location is perfect to leave the house on-foot or on two wheels and access some of the Asheville area's most beautiful nature trails.

2 minutes to the Blue Ridge Parkway, 10 minutes to West Asheville's Haywood Road, 15 minutes to Downtown Asheville and 0 minutes to Western North Carolina Paradise!

The space
The space is a complete studio apartment, with a separated and dedicated (doorless) bedroom, full bathroom with shower, full kitchen with large fridge, four burners, large oven, and all basic go-to appointments. There is also a small outdoor covered gravel porch with a bench swing and a table and chairs, where guests can enjoy the garden views.

name: Magnificent S&W Building Condo In The Heart of Downtown Asheville
description:
Stunning South city views, amazing outdoor space, and gorgeous contemporary design in this Historic S&W Art- Deco building, sunny and walkable condo in downtown Asheville. This 4th floor two-bedroom features a large living room, 1 king bedrooms, 1 Queen bedroom, each with private baths and 2 futons in the loft. Access the private, 50-ft wide terrace from the second upstairs living room in the condo via floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors. Wake up to peaceful mountain mist and coffee as you plan your day in Asheville. After enjoying what the town and surroundings have to offer, continue your vacation by relaxing in the condo with local art, and a fully-stocked kitchen. You can even catch the mountain sunrise while relaxing in the living room. The unit also provides no garage parking space but there are several paid city garages near by. Once you book you will receive the links to these garages.
Located on Patton Ave in downtown you are central to all that Asheville has to offer

Other points of interest: it sits four miles to the center of downtown, just over a mile to Crest Pavilion, nine miles to The Biltmore Estate, within ten miles of numerous hiking trails along the Blue Ridge Parkway. Your suite is private but close to so much!

description:

Perched high on a hill overlooking the French Broad River, the outdoor space provides ample opportunities for reconnecting to nature, relaxing in a hammock, and sitting by a fire. A short walk from the river; water-sport lovers - bring your boats and fishing gear. Watch the sunrise over the river each morning and breath in that fresh mountain air!

BATHROOM: has a full shower with hot water, vanity sink, and self-contained compost toilet.

The main floor of the yurt has a full kitchen and living room space, it also has a partitioned of bedroom with a queen bedand .There is also a full bathroom with a shower tub combo. Upstairs Loft contains a queen bed and a view out of the roof dome.

description:

This basement suite is bright & sunny with 4 windows, private entrance, queen bed, bathroom, tv, wifi, coffee maker, beverage fridge, microwave. The space is professionally cleaned between each guest to ensure you have a safe and enjoyable stay!

Centrally located and close to attractions yet with a peaceful secluded setting surrounded by nature.

description:

This is the perfect basecamp for a well-rounded Asheville adventure. My wife, baby Miles and I would love to share our home with you.

The space
Guests have a private entrance with a keypad, as well as their own full bathroom. The room has a kitchenette complete with Keurig, mini fridge, microwave and basic paper goods. You will have plenty of space for adventure gear with your own walk-in closet and space for hanging two bikes in the shared garage space. There are also two chairs and two folding tray tables in your room.

Though it is a full bathroom, the shower is narrow.

You ONLY HAVE ACCESS to 1 bedroom (book for 3 if you want to add the second bedroom) & one bath located in the first bedroom. Coffee/Tea is in your room. Per city permit, we cannot provide kitchen access. Parking for one car in drive. AVL permit #21-05840

If you would like both bedrooms, please book for 3. Note that your guest will need to share your en-suite bathroom with you.

All utilities, cleaning, lawn care and pest control included. Large laundry room.

name: Canvas Tent #0 @Baying Hound Campground
description:
This canvas tent is in the quirky and uniquely “Asheville” Baying Hound Campground. You’ll get a full-size bed with sheets & pillows in your tent. Take a look at the surroundings because this isn’t a spot for light sleepers or folks craving seclusion. Great for the social camper who doesn’t want to lug around camping gear! You've got prime access to our indoor bathroom, hang-out space and outdoor solar shower.

Note that we're not calling this "glamping". :) Please read the FULL description.

The space
CANVAS TENT
Our canvas tent is a couple steps up from setting up your own tent and roughing it, but certainly still a "camping" experience. Is it glamping? Nope. Is it a sweet camping set up? You bet. Is it one of the closest-to-downtown, most wallet-friendly options in Asheville that captures that "Asheville" flavor? Heck yeah.

*Autumn & winter nights in the Appalachians can get a little chilly. While we do provide a couple blankets, you

There is a kitchenette with farmhouse sink, microwave, coffee maker, larger style mini-fridge and breakfast island. The bathroom has a large walk-in shower.
